    {RРѓђ : Cрхњрхќ РЦц RingCat} {Rsh : CategoryTheory.Sheaf J RingCat} (╬▒ : RРѓђ РЪХ Rsh.obj)
    [Presheaf.IsLocallyInjective J ╬▒] [Presheaf.IsLocallySurjective J ╬▒]
    [J.WEqualsLocallyBijective AddCommGrpCat] [CategoryTheory.HasWeakSheafify J AddCommGrpCat]
    {A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules.{u} RРѓђ} (f : A РЪХ B)
    (hf : IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification ╬▒).map f)) :
    J.W ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf RРѓђ).map f) := by
  have h := PresheafOfModules.inverseImage_W_toPresheaf_eq_inverseImage_isomorphisms (J := J) ╬▒
  have h2 : (CategoryTheory.MorphismProperty.isomorphisms (SheafOfModules Rsh)).inverseImage
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafification ╬▒) f := hf
  rw [Рєљ h] at h2
  exact h2

/-- **D2' ╬┤-wrapping Рђћ the sheafified cotensorator on the unit pair is an iso, given the ╬и-bridge.**

The presheaf-level oplax unitality `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.left_unitality_hom` factors the
cotensorator `╬┤ (pullback ¤є') ­ЮЪЎ_ ­ЮЪЎ_` of the abstract presheaf pullback through the unit comparison
`╬и (pullback ¤є')` (right-whiskered by `F.obj ­ЮЪЎ_`) and the (iso) left unitor. Sheafifying, the
unitor factor and the `F.map (╬╗_ ­ЮЪЎ_)` factor are isomorphisms unconditionally; the whiskered
`╬и`-factor `a_Y.map (╬и F Рќи F.obj ­ЮЪЎ_)` is an iso whenever `a_Y.map (╬и F)` is Рђћ because a sheafified
iso lies in `J.W` (`W_of_isIso_sheafification`), `J.W` is stable under right-whiskering
(`W_whiskerRight_of_W`, flatness-free), and `J.W`-morphisms sheafify to isos
(`isIso_sheafification_map_of_W`). Hence the sheafified `╬┤` on the unit pair is an iso, which is
exactly the hypothesis the reduction brick `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` consumes
on `M = N = ­Юњф`. Project-local; the **╬┤-wrapping** half of D2' (`lem:pullback_tensor_iso_unit`),
self-contained modulo the ╬и-bridge `IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')))`. -/
lemma isIso_sheafifyDelta_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (h : letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
          (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
          (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
        IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')))) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
      (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')
        (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val)) := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  set a_Y := PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val) with ha
  change IsIso (a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є') (­ЮЪЎ_ _) (­ЮЪЎ_ _)))
  set F := PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є' with hF
  have hW╬и : (Opens.grothendieckTopology (Y : TopCat)).W
      ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf _).map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F)) :=
    W_of_isIso_sheafification (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val) _ h
  have hWw : (Opens.grothendieckTopology (Y : TopCat)).W
      ((PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf _).map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F Рќи F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))) :=
    PresheafOfModules.W_whiskerRight_of_W (R := Y.presheaf) _ _ hW╬и
  haveI hIsoW : IsIso (a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F Рќи F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))) :=
    PresheafOfModules.isIso_sheafification_map_of_W (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val) _ hWw
  haveI hIsoLam : IsIso (a_Y.map (╬╗_ (F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))).hom) := inferInstance
  have hBC : IsIso (a_Y.map
      (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F Рќи F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _) РЅФ (╬╗_ (F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))).hom)) := by
    rw [Functor.map_comp]; infer_instance
  haveI hD : IsIso (a_Y.map (F.map (╬╗_ (­ЮЪЎ_ _)).hom)) := inferInstance
  have hlu := Functor.OplaxMonoidal.left_unitality_hom F (­ЮЪЎ_ _)
  have key : a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ F (­ЮЪЎ_ _) (­ЮЪЎ_ _)) РЅФ
      a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F Рќи F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _) РЅФ (╬╗_ (F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))).hom)
      = a_Y.map (F.map (╬╗_ (­ЮЪЎ_ _)).hom) := by
    rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]; exact congrArg _ hlu
  have heq : a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ F (­ЮЪЎ_ _) (­ЮЪЎ_ _))
      = a_Y.map (F.map (╬╗_ (­ЮЪЎ_ _)).hom) РЅФ
        inv (a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F Рќи F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _) РЅФ (╬╗_ (F.obj (­ЮЪЎ_ _))).hom)) := by
    rw [Рєљ key, Category.assoc, IsIso.hom_inv_id, Category.comp_id]
  rw [heq]; infer_instance

/-- **D2' assembly Рђћ `pullbackTensorMap` on the unit pair is an iso, given the ╬и-bridge.**
Chains the ╬┤-wrapping `isIso_sheafifyDelta_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta` into the reduction brick
`isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` (on `M = N = ­Юњф`). This is the full statement of
D2' (`lem:pullback_tensor_iso_unit`) modulo the single remaining ╬и-bridge hypothesis
`IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')))` (the sheafification-mate identification of the sheafified
presheaf unit comparison with `pullbackUnitIso`, the unit-side analog of
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`). Project-local. -/
lemma isIso_pullbackTensorMap_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (h : letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
          (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
          (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
        IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')))) :
    IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
      (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) := by
  apply isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta
  exact isIso_sheafifyDelta_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta f h

/-! **D2' onward Рђћ handoff (iter-246).** The ╬┤-wrapping half of D2' is now LANDED axiom-clean:
`isIso_sheafifyDelta_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta` reduces the sheafified `╬┤` on the unit pair to
the ╬и-bridge `IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')))` (via `left_unitality_hom` + the W-stable
right-whiskering `W_whiskerRight_of_W` fed by the new converse `W_of_isIso_sheafification`), and
`isIso_pullbackTensorMap_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta` chains it into the reduction brick. So the
SOLE remaining content of D2' is the **╬и-bridge**

  `IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')))`.

This is the commuting square (`sheafifyUnitIso` is its right vertical, built above)
`a_Y.map (╬и F) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom = (pullbackValIso f ­Юњф_X).hom РЅФ pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є`.
Transposing across `SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є` (apply `.homEquiv.injective`,
then `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit`, `homEquiv_unit`,
`leftAdjointOplaxMonoidal_╬и`, `homEquiv_counit`) reduces the square to the concrete pushforward-side
identity (sheafification-mate bridge):

  `sheafAdj.unit.app ­Юњф_X РЅФ (pushforward ¤є).map ((pullbackValIso).inv РЅФ
      a_Y.map (pullback_pre.map ╬х_pre РЅФ presheafAdj.counit) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom)
    = unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є`,

where `╬х_pre = LaxMonoidal.╬х (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є.hom)`. The glue is the leftAdjointUniq
compatibility of `SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback`/`pullbackIso` (the bridges inside
`pullbackValIso`) Рђћ `Adjunction.{homEquiv_,unit_,}leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`,
`leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit` Рђћ relating the presheaf and sheaf adjunction units; this is the
unit-side analog of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`, NOT yet assembled (a self-contained next step).

* **D3'/D4'** (the chart-chase): use `isIso_of_isIso_restrict` (L546) over the common trivialising
  cover; on each chart D3' (╬┤ commutes with the open-immersion base-change square Рђћ the sole
  genuinely-new mate calculus, analog of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`) localises the sheafified ╬┤,
  the naturality D1' transports to the unit pair, and D2' closes. Each stays inside
  `IsIso (a_Y.map ╬┤ Рђд)`, so `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` is the shared entry. -/

/-- **Codomain identification for the D2' ╬и-bridge.** The sheafification counit identifies the
sheafified presheaf monoidal unit `a_Y.obj ­ЮЪЎ_` with the sheaf-level structure module
`­Юњф_Y = SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf` (`­ЮЪЎ_ = (unit Y).val` definitionally, and `unit Y` is
already a sheaf, so the counit at it is an isomorphism). This is the right-hand vertical of the
╬и-bridge square `a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom
= (pullbackValIso f ­Юњф_X).hom РЅФ pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є` whose commutativity is the remaining
content of D2' (see the handoff note above and `task_results`). Project-local building block. -/
noncomputable def sheafifyUnitIso {Y : Scheme.{u}} :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)))
      РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf :=
  (asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
    (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit).app (SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf)

/-- **Presheaf-side mate identity for the ╬и-bridge** (`unit_app_unit_comp_map_╬и` instantiated).
For a scheme morphism `f : Y РЪХ X` with `¤є' = f.toRingCatSheafHom.hom`, the presheaf-of-modules
adjunction unit at the monoidal unit, post-composed with the pushforward of the oplax unit
comparison `╬и (pullback ¤є')`, recovers the lax unit `╬х (pushforward ¤є')`. This is the
presheaf-level driver of the D2' ╬и-bridge: under sheafification (via `sheafificationCompPullback`)
it transports to the sheaf identity
`homEquiv (pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є) = unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є`.
Project-local: it certifies that the project's `presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal` /
`presheafPullbackOplaxMonoidal` instances are `Adjunction.IsMonoidal`-compatible, so the Mathlib
mate identity fires for this concrete adjunction. -/
lemma presheafUnit_comp_map_eta {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').unit.app
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))) РЅФ
      (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').map
        (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'))
      = Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬х (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є') := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  haveI : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
  exact Adjunction.unit_app_unit_comp_map_╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є')

/-- **D2' ╬и-bridge Рђћ IsIso reduction to the unit comparison square** (axiom-clean plumbing).
Given the commuting square identifying the sheafified presheaf unit comparison `a_Y.map (╬и F)`
with the sheaf-level `pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є` through the canonical isos `pullbackValIso` and
`sheafifyUnitIso`, the ╬и-bridge `IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')))` follows (the comparison
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є` is an iso since `Opens.map f.base` is always `Final`). This isolates the
SOLE remaining mathematical content of the ╬и-bridge as the square hypothesis `hsq` (= the unit-side
analog of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`, see handoff in `task_results`). Project-local. -/
lemma isIso_sheafifyEta_of_unitSquare {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (hsq : letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
          (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
          (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
        (pullbackValIso f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)).inv РЅФ
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
            (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom
          = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit f.toRingCatSheafHom) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    IsIso ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
      (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'))) := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  set a_Y := PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val) with ha
  set F := PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є' with hF
  haveI hfin : (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).Final := final_of_representablyFlat _
  haveI hpbu : IsIso (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit f.toRingCatSheafHom) :=
    isIso_pbu_of_final f
  have key : a_Y.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и F) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom
      = (pullbackValIso f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)).hom РЅФ
        SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit f.toRingCatSheafHom :=
    (Iso.inv_comp_eq _).mp hsq
  rw [(Iso.eq_comp_inv sheafifyUnitIso).mpr key]
  exact IsIso.comp_isIso' (IsIso.comp_isIso' inferInstance hpbu) inferInstance

/-- **Composite-adjunction `homEquiv` factorisation** (blueprint
`lem:comp_homequiv_factor_sheafify_pullback`, РўЁ step 3). For composable adjunctions
`adjРѓЂ : LРѓЂ РіБ RРѓЂ` and `adjРѓѓ : LРѓѓ РіБ RРѓѓ`, the hom-set bijection of the composite adjunction
`A = adjРѓЂ.comp adjРѓѓ : LРѓЂ РІЎ LРѓѓ РіБ RРѓѓ РІЎ RРѓЂ` factors as the composite of the two factor
bijections: a morphism `(LРѓЂ РІЎ LРѓѓ).obj c РЪХ e` is transposed first across `adjРѓѓ` and then
across `adjРѓЂ`. This is the standard naturality of `homEquiv` under composition of adjunctions,
read off the `homEquiv = unit РЅФ R.map` formula together with `Adjunction.comp_unit_app`.
Project-local. -/
lemma compHomEquivFactor {CРѓЂ : Type*} {CРѓѓ : Type*} {CРѓЃ : Type*}
    [Category CРѓЂ] [Category CРѓѓ] [Category CРѓЃ]
    {LРѓЂ : CРѓЂ РЦц CРѓѓ} {RРѓЂ : CРѓѓ РЦц CРѓЂ} {LРѓѓ : CРѓѓ РЦц CРѓЃ} {RРѓѓ : CРѓЃ РЦц CРѓѓ}
    (adjРѓЂ : LРѓЂ РіБ RРѓЂ) (adjРѓѓ : LРѓѓ РіБ RРѓѓ) {c : CРѓЂ} {e : CРѓЃ}
    (g : (LРѓЂ РІЎ LРѓѓ).obj c РЪХ e) :
    (adjРѓЂ.comp adjРѓѓ).homEquiv c e g
      = adjРѓЂ.homEquiv c (RРѓѓ.obj e) (adjРѓѓ.homEquiv (LРѓЂ.obj c) e g) := by
  simp only [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, Functor.comp_map,
    Functor.map_comp]
  exact Category.assoc _ _ _

/-- **The `sheafificationCompPullback` comparison is the canonical `leftAdjointUniq`** of the
two composite adjunctions of the unit square. With
`A = (sheafificationAdjunction ­ЮЪЎ_X).comp (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є)` (left
adjoint `a_X РІЎ SheafOfModules.pullback ¤є`) and
`B = (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').comp (sheafificationAdjunction ­ЮЪЎ_Y)`
(left adjoint `PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є' РІЎ a_Y`), the Mathlib device
`SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback ¤є` is, on the nose (`rfl`),
`Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq A B`. This is the definitional identification the blueprint asserts
(`lem:leftadjointuniq_app_unit_eta`): it is what makes the mate-calculus `homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq`
identities fire for the concrete unit-square adjunctions. Project-local linchpin. -/
lemma sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback f.toRingCatSheafHom
      = ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
            (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
          (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f.toRingCatSheafHom)).leftAdjointUniq
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').comp
          (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := Y.ringCatSheaf)
            (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val))) :=
  rfl

/-- **leftAdjointUniq transport of the composite unit** (blueprint
`lem:leftadjointuniq_app_unit_eta`, РўЁ step 4). For the two composite adjunctions `A`, `B` of the
unit square, applying `A.homEquiv` to the `­ЮЪЎ_`-component of the comparison
`sheafificationCompPullback ¤є` recovers `B.unit.app ­ЮЪЎ_`, which expands (by
`Adjunction.comp_unit_app` on `B`) into the presheaf pullbackРђЊpushforward unit followed by the
pushforward of the sheafification unit. This is the genuinely adjunction-theoretic head of step 4
of `lem:eta_bridge_unit_square`. Project-local. -/
lemma leftAdjointUniqUnitEta {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
          (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
        (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f.toRingCatSheafHom)).homEquiv
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))) _
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom.app
          (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))))
      = (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').unit.app
          (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))) РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := Y.ringCatSheaf)
              (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є').obj
              (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))))) := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  set A := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
      (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
      (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f.toRingCatSheafHom)
    with hA
  set B := (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').comp
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val))
    with hB
  have hg : (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom.app
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)))
      = (A.leftAdjointUniq B).hom.app
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))) := rfl
  rw [hg]
  refine Eq.trans (Adjunction.homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app A B
    (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)))) ?_
  rw [hB, Adjunction.comp_unit_app]
  rfl

/-- **leftAdjointUniq transport of the composite unit, general object** (the `P`-general form of
`leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`, ma-d3264 step 1). For the two composite adjunctions `A`, `B` of the unit
square and ANY presheaf of modules `P`, applying `A.homEquiv` to the `P`-component of the comparison
`sheafificationCompPullback ¤є` recovers `B.unit.app P`, expanded by `Adjunction.comp_unit_app` on `B`
as `PrPbPushAdj ¤є' .unit P РЅФ pushforward ¤є' .map (sheafAdj_Y.unit (pullback ¤є' P))`. This is the
R1/R5-recovery brick of `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail`: it identifies the `sheafCompPb f .hom.app P`
factor with the composite-adjunction `B_f`-unit. The proof is the object-generic version of
`leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` (which is the `P := ­ЮЪЎ_` specialization); nothing about `­ЮЪЎ_` is used. -/
lemma leftAdjointUniqUnitEta_app {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
          (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
        (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f.toRingCatSheafHom)).homEquiv P _
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom.app P)
      = (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').unit.app P РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := Y.ringCatSheaf)
              (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є').obj P)) := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  set A := (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
      (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
      (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f.toRingCatSheafHom)
    with hA
  set B := (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').comp
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val))
    with hB
  have hg : (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom.app P
      = (A.leftAdjointUniq B).hom.app P := rfl
  rw [hg]
  refine Eq.trans (Adjunction.homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app A B P) ?_
  rw [hB, Adjunction.comp_unit_app]
  rfl

/-- **`restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ R)` is the identity on morphisms.** `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ R)` is defeq to the
identity functor `­ЮЪГ`, so its action on a morphism is the morphism itself. Stated as a *propositional*
rewrite (proved once over an abstract `g`, hence cheap) so that the `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)` wrappers in
the D2Рђ▓ `(РѕЌРѕЌ)` goal can be stripped by a single SYNTACTIC `rw` Рђћ avoiding the catastrophic whole-term
`whnf` that a `show`/`rfl` triggers on the sheafification-laden composites. Project-local. -/
lemma restrictScalarsId_map {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {R : Cрхњрхќ РЦц RingCat.{u}}
    {M N : _root_.PresheafOfModules R} (g : M РЪХ N) :
    (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ R)).map g = g := rfl

set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
/-- **Step 7 Рђћ the presheaf lax-unit `╬х` of `pushforward ¤є'` is the underlying presheaf map of
the sheaf-level structure-unit comparison `unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є`** (blueprint
`lem:epsilon_presheaf_to_sheaf_unit`). Both act sectionwise as `¤є.hom.app X`. This is the SOLE
genuinely-new ingredient of the D2Рђ▓ `(РѕЌРѕЌ)` close: after the abstract telescope and the Y-side
sheafification triangle fold the big `homEquiv` argument down to `╬х (pushforward ¤є')`, this lemma
lands it on `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є).val` (defeq `R_X.map (unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є)`).
Proved sectionwise via the `Functor.LaxMonoidal.comp` ╬х-formula (`pushforwardРѓђ`'s `╬х = ­ЮЪЎ`),
`restrictScalarsLax╬х`, `ModuleCat.restrictScalars_╬и`, and `unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply`.
Project-local. -/
lemma epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬х (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є')
      = (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit f.toRingCatSheafHom).val := by
  apply PresheafOfModules.hom_ext
  intro XРѓђ
  apply ModuleCat.hom_ext
  ext r
  -- Provide the `CommRing` instance on the scalar ring `SРѓђ` in the `(restrictScalars f).obj ­ЮЪЎ_`
  -- spelling that `ModuleCat.restrictScalars_╬и` synthesises against (synthInstance does not reduce
  -- `(restrictScalars f).obj ­ЮЪЎ_` to the `forgetРѓѓ`-carrier where the canonical instance is keyed).
  letI : CommRing РєЉ((ModuleCat.restrictScalars
      (RingCat.Hom.hom ((Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom.app XРѓђ))).obj (­ЮЪЎ_ (ModuleCat
        РєЉ((((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ Y.presheaf) РІЎ
            forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).obj XРѓђ)))) :=
    inferInstanceAs (CommRing РєЉ((((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ Y.presheaf) РІЎ
      forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).obj XРѓђ))
  -- LHS: `╬х (pushforward ¤є')` reduces (through the `pushforwardРѓђ РІЎ restrictScalars` composite,
  -- `pushforwardРѓђ`'s `╬х = ­ЮЪЎ`) to `╬х (restrictScalars ¤є'.app XРѓђ)`, hence to `¤є'.app XРѓђ` by
  -- `restrictScalars_╬и`.  RHS: `unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply` gives `¤є.hom.app XРѓђ`.
  erw [SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply, ModuleCat.restrictScalars_╬и]
  rfl

-- The sheafification-adjunction right-triangle / unit-naturality composites force `whnf` on the heavy
-- sheafification machinery (`­ЮЪЎ_Yp` vs `(unit Y).val` defeq), exceeding the default 200000 budget.
set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
/-- **Y-side sheafification right-triangle for the oplax unit comparison** (substep (ii) of the D2Рђ▓
`(РѕЌРѕЌ)` close). For `f : Y РЪХ X` with `¤є' = f.toRingCatSheafHom.hom` and `F = pullback ¤є'`, the
sheafification unit at `F.obj ­ЮЪЎрхќ`, post-composed with the underlying presheaf maps of `a_Y.map (╬и F)`
and `sheafifyUnitIso.hom`, recovers the oplax unit comparison `╬и F`. This is exactly
`Equiv.apply_symm_apply` for the presheaf sheafification adjunction `homEquiv`: the second factor
`a_Y.map (╬и F) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom` is `homEquiv.symm (╬и F)` (its counit factor `sheafifyUnitIso.hom`
is the adjunction counit at the sheaf `­Юњф_Y`), so `homEquiv` of it is `╬и F`. Extracted as a standalone
lemma so its elaboration cost does not bloat the heavy `pullbackEtaUnitSquare` telescope. Project-local. -/
lemma pullbackSheafifyUnitEtaTriangle {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є').obj
          (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))))
      РЅФ (((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).map
            (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'))).val РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val)
      = Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є') := by
  letI : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).IsRightAdjoint :=
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction _).isRightAdjoint
  -- Reassociate, fold the sheafification-unit naturality at `╬и F`, then the right-triangle on `­Юњф_Y`.
  rw [Рєљ Category.assoc]
  erw [Рєљ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.naturality,
    Category.assoc, Functor.id_map]
  -- Y-side right triangle on the SHEAF `­Юњф_Y = unit Y`: `sheafifyUnitIso = (asIso counit).app ­Юњф_Y`.
  have htri : (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
        (­ЮЪЎ_ (_root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)))
      РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val = ­ЮЪЎ _ := by
    rw [sheafifyUnitIso]
    simpa only [Iso.app_hom, asIso_hom] using
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))).right_triangle_components (SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf)
  -- `rw [htri]` cannot fire on the LHS (the codomain `­ЮЪЎ_Yp` vs `(unit Y).val` are defeq only at
  -- non-reducible transparency).  Expand the RHS `╬и F` to `╬и F РЅФ ­ЮЪЎ` via `Category.comp_id` (its
  -- `╬и F` is read off the goal Рђћ no `OplaxMonoidal` re-synthesis), then `congr 1` reduces to `htri`.
  refine Eq.trans ?_ (Category.comp_id _)
  congr 1

-- The mate-calculus telescope (steps 1РђЊ6) plus the substep-(i) `.val` reshaping and the syntactic
-- `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)`-strip (`kabstract` on the sheafification-laden composites) exceed the default
-- 200000 budget; 3200000 is comfortably sufficient for the assembled proof.
set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000 in
/-- **The unit square** (blueprint `lem:eta_bridge_unit_square`, the assembly target). The
sheafified presheaf unit comparison `a_Y.map (╬и F)`, conjugated by the canonical isos
`pullbackValIso` and `sheafifyUnitIso`, equals the sheaf-level structure-unit comparison
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit ¤є`. The proof transposes the square across the *sheaf* pullbackРђЊpushforward
adjunction `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є` (`homEquiv.injective`); the right-hand side image is
`unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є` by `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit`,
reducing the square to the concrete pushforward-side identity (РѕЌРѕЌ), which telescopes through the
already-closed `compHomEquivFactor` (step 3), `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` (step 4) and
`presheafUnit_comp_map_eta` (step 6). Project-local. -/
lemma pullbackEtaUnitSquare {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    (pullbackValIso f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)).inv РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є')) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom
        = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit f.toRingCatSheafHom := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  set ¤є := f.toRingCatSheafHom with h¤є
  -- Transpose across the sheaf pullbackРђЊpushforward adjunction.
  apply ((SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є).homEquiv
    (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf) (SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf)).injective
  rw [SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit]
  -- We keep the goal in `homEquiv` form (NOT unfolding via `homEquiv_unit`), driving the
  -- telescope through the closed mate-lemmas `compHomEquivFactor`, `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`,
  -- `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta` and the `rfl`-linchpin `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`.
  -- Step 1: decompose `pullbackValIso.inv` into `(pullback ¤є).map cРЂ╗┬╣ РЅФ (sheafificationCompPullback ¤є).hom`
  -- where `c = (asIso (sheafification-counit_X)).app ­Юњф_X`.
  simp only [pullbackValIso, Iso.trans_inv, Iso.symm_inv, Functor.mapIso_inv]
  rw [Category.assoc]
  -- Step 2: pull the leading `(pullback ¤є).map cРЂ╗┬╣` out of `homEquiv` (`homEquiv_naturality_left`),
  -- then peel off the trailing `rest = a_Y.map (╬и F) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom` (`homEquiv_naturality_right`).
  erw [Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left, Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_right]
  -- Steps 3+4: rewrite `sheafAdj.homEquiv (sheafificationCompPullback ¤є).hom.app ­ЮЪЎрхќ` via the
  -- composite-adjunction factorisation `compHomEquivFactor` and then `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`.
  have hkey :
      (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є).homEquiv _ _
          ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app
            (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val).hom
        = ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
              (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).homEquiv _ _).symm
            (((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
                (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
                (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є)).homEquiv _ _
              ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app
                (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val).hom) := by
    rw [Equiv.eq_symm_apply, Рєљ compHomEquivFactor]
  erw [hkey, leftAdjointUniqUnitEta f]
  -- Fold the trailing `(pushforward ¤є).map rest` into the X-side `homEquiv.symm`
  -- (`homEquiv_naturality_right_symm`): `symm(x) РЅФ k = symm(x РЅФ R_X.map k)`.
  erw [Рєљ Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_right_symm]
  -- X-triangle (`right_triangle_components`): the sheafification unit/counit on the sheaf `­Юњф_X`
  -- cancel, collapsing `homEquiv (c.hom РЅФ unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є)` to `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є).val`.
  have hXtri : (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
        (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val РЅФ
      (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).map
        ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map
          ((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
              (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).counit).app (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)).hom)
      = ­ЮЪЎ _ := by
    simpa only [Iso.app_hom, asIso_hom, Functor.comp_map] using
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).right_triangle_components (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
  have hrhs : ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).homEquiv
        (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf).val
        ((SheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є).obj (SheafOfModules.unit Y.ringCatSheaf)))
      (((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).counit).app
          (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)).hom РЅФ SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є)
      = (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf РІЎ
          PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).map
          (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є) := by
    rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
    simp only [Functor.comp_map, Functor.map_comp]
    exact (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans (hXtri РќИ Category.id_comp _)
  -- Move `cРЂ╗┬╣` to the RHS (`Iso.inv_comp_eq`), transpose the X-side `homEquiv.symm`
  -- (`Equiv.symm_apply_eq`), and collapse via `hrhs`, reducing to a PRESHEAF-level equation
  -- whose RHS is `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є).val`.
  rw [Iso.inv_comp_eq, Equiv.symm_apply_eq]
  refine Eq.trans ?_ hrhs.symm
  -- REMAINING (РѕЌРѕЌ): the concrete pushforward-side presheaf identity.  Substep (i): split the `.val`
  -- of `g = a_Y.map (╬и F) РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom` and reduce `R_X.map ((pushforward ¤є).map g)`.
  simp only [Functor.comp_map, SheafOfModules.forget_map, SheafOfModules.pushforward_map_val,
    SheafOfModules.comp_val]
  -- Strip the two `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)` wrappers SYNTACTICALLY via `restrictScalarsId_map`, landing
  -- the goal in the syntactic presheaf category (no `whnf` on `rs`-over-sheafification Рђћ that is
  -- catastrophic).  This succeeds and leaves the CLEAN presheaf goal
  --   `(u РЅФ pfРѓЂ.map toSheafify_Y) РЅФ pfРѓѓ.map ((a_Y.map (╬и F)).val РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val)
  --      = (unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).val`,
  -- where `pfРѓЂ = pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom` and `pfРѓѓ = pushforward ¤є.hom` are DEFEQ
  -- but spelled differently (`Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f` from `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` vs the `set`-local
  -- `¤є`).  The remaining math is exactly: merge the two `pushforward`-images via `Functor.map_comp`,
  -- fold `toSheafify_Y РЅФ (a_Y.map (╬и F)).val РЅФ sheafifyUnitIso.hom.val = ╬и F` by the (closed)
  -- `pullbackSheafifyUnitEtaTriangle f`, then `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta f` and (closed)
  -- `epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit f` collapse to `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є).val`.
  rw [restrictScalarsId_map, restrictScalarsId_map]
  -- Reassociate and merge the two `pushforward ¤є'`-images via `erw` (keyed-defeq matching tolerates the
  -- `pfРѓЂ`/`pfРѓѓ` zeta-spelling at the connecting object), fold the argument to `╬и F` (ii), and collapse
  -- to `(unitToPushforwardObjUnit ¤є).val` via (6) `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta` + (iii) `epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit`.
  erw [Category.assoc, Рєљ Functor.map_comp, pullbackSheafifyUnitEtaTriangle f,
    presheafUnit_comp_map_eta f, epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit f]

/-- **D2Рђ▓ Рђћ the pullbackРђЊtensor comparison on the unit pair is an isomorphism** (blueprint
`lem:pullback_tensor_iso_unit`). Feeds the unit square `pullbackEtaUnitSquare` into the IsIso
plumbing `isIso_sheafifyEta_of_unitSquare` (yielding `IsIso (a_Y.map (╬и (pullback ¤є')))`), then into
the iter-246 ╬┤-wrapping `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta`. Project-local. -/
lemma pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
      (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) :=
  isIso_pullbackTensorMap_unitPair_of_isIso_sheafifyEta f
    (isIso_sheafifyEta_of_unitSquare f (pullbackEtaUnitSquare f))

/-- **Characterisation of `sheafifyTensorUnitIso.hom` on the `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` carrier.** Strips the
`letI instMS` cast so the two `a.map` whisker factors are stated on the same presheaf carrier as
the rest of `pullbackTensorMap` Рђћ the bridge that lets `Functor.map_comp` merge them. -/
lemma sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq {X : Scheme.{u}}
    (P Q : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    (sheafifyTensorUnitIso P Q).hom
      = (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight
            (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
              (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app P) Q) РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (MonoidalCategory.whiskerLeft
            (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
              (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P).val
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
              (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app Q)) := by
  rfl

/-- **`sheafifyTensorUnitIso.hom` as `a.map` of a single `tensorHom`** (tscmp254 carrier-pin). The
two whisker factors of `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq` merge (`Рєљ Functor.map_comp`) into a single
`a.map` of `╬и_P Рќи Q РЅФ (aP).val РЌЂ ╬и_Q`, which is the `tensorHom` `╬и_P РіЌ ╬и_Q` of the two
sheafification-unit components by `tensorHom_def` (the `exact` absorbs the defeq `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)`
wrapper on `╬и`'s codomain that blocks a syntactic `Рєљ tensorHom_def`).  Stating the comparison as ONE
`tensorHom` keeps every term in the single monoidal instance on the `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` carrier, so the
naturality reduces to plain bifunctoriality (`Рєљ tensor_comp`) + the two single-component unit
squares Рђћ no `whisker_exchange`, no cross-instance crossing. -/
lemma sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq' {X : Scheme.{u}}
    (P Q : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    (sheafifyTensorUnitIso P Q).hom
      = (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom
            (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
              (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app P)
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
              (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).unit.app Q)) := by
  rw [sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq, Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
  congr 1
  exact (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_def
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) _ _).symm

-- The `erw` defeq matching across the `SheafOfModules`/`Scheme.Modules` carrier and the
-- sheafification-laden composites is heartbeat-heavy; bump past the default.
set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
/-- **Naturality of `pullbackValIso` in the module argument.** For `u : M РЪХ M'` in `X.Modules`,
the identification `pullbackValIso f` (sheafified presheaf-pullback РЅЁ abstract pullback) is natural:
`a_Y.map (F.map u.val) РЅФ (pullbackValIso f M').hom = (pullbackValIso f M).hom РЅФ (pullback f).map u`,
where `F = PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'`. Both factors of `pullbackValIso`
(`sheafificationCompPullback` and the sheafification counit) are natural; this is their paste.
Helper for `pullbackTensorMap_natural` (D1Рђ▓). -/
lemma pullbackValIso_hom_natural {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) {M M' : X.Modules} (u : M РЪХ M') :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Y.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).map u.val) РЅФ
      (pullbackValIso f M').hom
      = (pullbackValIso f M).hom РЅФ (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map u := by
  simp only [pullbackValIso, Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Functor.mapIso_hom, Category.assoc]
  rw [Рєљ Category.assoc]
  erw [(SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).inv.naturality u.val]
  rw [Functor.comp_map,
    show (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
            (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map u.val)
        = (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
            (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map u.val) from rfl]
  erw [Category.assoc]
  erw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp (Scheme.Modules.pullback f)
      ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map u.val)
      ((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit).app M').hom,
    Рєљ Functor.map_comp (Scheme.Modules.pullback f)
      ((asIso (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit).app M).hom u]
  congr 1
  congr 1
  exact (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
    (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).counit.naturality u

-- Whiskered sheafification-unit naturality across the sheafification-laden composites is
-- heartbeat-heavy; bump past the default.
set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
/-- **Naturality of `sheafifyTensorUnitIso`.** For presheaf maps `p : P РЪХ P'`, `q : Q РЪХ Q'`,
the reconciliation `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` (relating `a(PРіЌQ)` with `a((aP).val РіЌ (aQ).val)`) is
natural. It is the paste of the naturality of the sheafification unit `╬и` whiskered on each side.
Helper for `pullbackTensorMap_natural` (D1Рђ▓). -/
lemma sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural {X : Scheme.{u}}
    {P P' Q Q' : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)}
    (p : P РЪХ P') (q : Q РЪХ Q') :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
        (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules
          (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) p q) РЅФ
      (sheafifyTensorUnitIso P' Q').hom
      = (sheafifyTensorUnitIso P Q).hom РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules
            (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
                (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map p))
            ((SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map
              ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
                (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).map q))) := by
  -- Pin both comparison factors as a single `a.map (╬и РіЌ ╬и)` (tscmp254 `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'`):
  -- the naturality is then a `Functor.map_comp` merge + plain bifunctoriality, with every term in the
  -- ONE monoidal instance on the `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` carrier Рђћ no `whisker_exchange`, no cross-instance
  -- crossing, no `erw`-on-`restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)`-over-sheafification `whnf`.
  rw [sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq', sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq']
  -- Merge both `a.map _ РЅФ a.map _` (`erw`: the connecting tensor object is defeq-but-not-syntactic
  -- Рђћ `Monoidal.tensorObj` vs the `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` instance, plus the `restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)` wrapper on
  -- `╬и`'s codomain Рђћ but cheap: no `restrictScalars`-over-sheafification `whnf` at the boundary).
  erw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp, Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
  congr 1
  -- Presheaf goal: (p РіЌ q) РЅФ (╬и_{P'} РіЌ ╬и_{Q'}) = (╬и_P РіЌ ╬и_Q) РЅФ (a.map p РіЌ a.map q).
  -- Single-component unit-naturality squares (`restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ)` map-wrapper stripped).
  have hp : p РЅФ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app P'
      = (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app P РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).map p) := by
    simpa only [Functor.id_map, Functor.comp_map, restrictScalarsId_map]
      using (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.naturality p
  have hq : q РЅФ (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app Q'
      = (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app Q РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).map q) := by
    simpa only [Functor.id_map, Functor.comp_map, restrictScalarsId_map]
      using (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction
        (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).unit.naturality q
  -- Split the LHS `tensorHom`-composite (`tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`, applied as a defeq-matched TERM
  -- since `rw` cannot bridge the non-canonical monoidal instance baked into the goal), apply the two
  -- unit squares, then reassemble into the RHS `tensorHom`-composite.  `(C := Рђд)` is supplied so the
  -- `MonoidalCategory` instance resolves (the underscore form leaves it a stuck metavariable).
  refine (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) _ _ _ _).trans ?_
  rw [hp, hq]
  exact (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) _ _ _ _).symm

-- The 4-square diagram chase pastes naturality across the sheafification-laden composites and is
-- driven by `erw` keyed-defeq merges (bridging the `Sheaf.val`/`.obj` and monoidal-instance
-- spellings); bump well past the default.
set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000 in
/-- **D1Рђ▓ Рђћ naturality of the sheaf-level pullbackРђЊtensor comparison `pullbackTensorMap`**
(blueprint `lem:pullback_tensor_map_natural`). For `a : M РЪХ M'`, `b : N РЪХ N'` in `X.Modules`,
the comparison `╬┤_sheaf = pullbackTensorMap f` commutes with `f^*(a РіЌ b)` on the source and
`f^*a РіЌ f^*b` on the target. Project-local. -/
lemma pullbackTensorMap_natural {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    {M M' N N' : X.Modules} (a : M РЪХ M') (b : N РЪХ N') :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map (tensorObj_functoriality a b) РЅФ pullbackTensorMap f M' N'
      = pullbackTensorMap f M N РЅФ
        tensorObj_functoriality ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map a)
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map b) := by
  -- `pullbackTensorMap f M N` is the four-fold composite
  --   S1 РЅФ S2 РЅФ S3 РЅФ S4 with
  --   S1 = (sheafificationCompPullback ¤є).app (M.val РіЌ N.val) .hom,
  --   S2 = a_Y.map (╬┤ (pullback ¤є') M.val N.val),
  --   S3 = (sheafifyTensorUnitIso (F M.val) (F N.val)).hom,
  --   S4 = a_Y.map (tensorHom (pullbackValIso f M).hom.val (pullbackValIso f N).hom.val).
  -- Naturality is the paste of four squares:
  --   Рђб S1 : naturality of `sheafificationCompPullback ¤є` at `tensorHom a.val b.val` (NatTrans);
  --   Рђб S2 : `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤_natural` for `pullback ¤є'`, under `a_Y.map`;
  --   Рђб S3 : `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural` (helper above, CLOSED);
  --   Рђб S4 : `pullbackValIso_hom_natural` (helper above, CLOSED) + bifunctoriality of `РіЌ`.
  -- The cleaner route (avoiding the sheaf-level carrier friction at S1) is to merge
  -- `a_Y.map ╬┤ РЅФ S3 РЅФ S4` into a single `a_Y.map ╬е` (╬е presheaf-level), move S1 by its NatTrans
  -- naturality, and discharge the resulting PRESHEAF equation by `╬┤_natural` + the ╬и-naturality of
  -- the two helpers Рђћ the same merge that `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural` reduces to.
  simp only [pullbackTensorMap, tensorObj_functoriality]
  -- Square 1 (S1) Рђћ CLOSED: naturality of the `sheafificationCompPullback ¤є` natural iso at
  -- `a.val РіЌРѓў b.val`.  After this the goal is
  --   S1 РЅФ a_Y.map (Fp.map (a.val РіЌ b.val)) РЅФ a_Y.map ╬┤' РЅФ S3' РЅФ S4'
  --     = (S1 РЅФ a_Y.map ╬┤ РЅФ S3 РЅФ S4) РЅФ Q0,   Fp = PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'.
  erw [(SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).hom.naturality_assoc]
  rw [Functor.comp_map]
  -- Square 2 (S2): `Functor.comp_map` left the first `a_Y` spelled `sheafification (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.obj)`
  -- while the `╬┤`-factor reads `sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Y.ringCatSheaf))` (SAME functor,
  -- `Sheaf.val = .obj`).  Normalise `Sheaf.val Рєњ .obj` so the two `a_Y.map`s share a functor, merge
  -- them, and commute `╬┤` past `Fp.map (a.val РіЌ b.val)` by `╬┤_natural` (reverse), then split.
  dsimp only [CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val]
  -- Square 2 merge Рђћ SOLVED (iter-254): the `Рєљ Functor.map_comp` of the iter-253 BLOCKER fails because
  -- the two `a_Y.map`s are right-associated (`a.map A РЅФ (a.map B РЅФ rest)`), so `A`/`B` are not the
  -- direct operands of one `РЅФ`.  The fix is the *reassoc* form `Рєљ Functor.map_comp_assoc` (`erw`, to
  -- bridge the non-canonical monoidal instance baked into the goal exactly as STEP A does): it merges
  -- `a.map (Fp.map (a.val РіЌ b.val)) РЅФ a.map (╬┤_{M',N'}) РЅФ rest`
  --   into `a.map (Fp.map (a.val РіЌ b.val) РЅФ ╬┤_{M',N'}) РЅФ rest`, with `Fp = PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'`.
  erw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp_assoc]
  -- РћђРћђ REMAINING (Square 2 Рђћ ╬┤ commutation): under the merged `a.map (Рђд)` the argument is
  --   `Fp.map (a.val РіЌ b.val) РЅФ ╬┤_{M'.val,N'.val}`,  Fp = PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є',
  -- which by oplax naturality `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤_natural` equals
  --   `╬┤_{M.val,N.val} РЅФ (Fp.map a.val РіЌ Fp.map b.val)`.
  -- Square 2 (╬┤ commutation) Рђћ CLOSED via the mapin255 LIGHT fix: re-present `F`'s ring-hom at the
  -- canonical `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` spelling with a `show Рђд from` ascription inside the `╬┤_natural` application,
  -- so the registered `MonoidalCategory` instance synthesizes.  `erw` (not `rw`): the ascription
  -- pretty-prints as `have this := Рђд; this`, whose reducible-defeq match to the bare hom only `erw`
  -- bridges.  After this Square 2 is done; `dsimp only []` strips the cosmetic `have this := Рђд; this`.
  erw [Рєљ Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤_natural
    (F := PresheafOfModules.pullback
      (show (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
          (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
        from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom))
    a.val b.val]
  dsimp only []
  -- Now: S1 РЅФ a_Y.map (╬┤_{M,N} РЅФ (Fp.map a.val РіЌ Fp.map b.val)) РЅФ S3(M',N') РЅФ S4(M',N')
  --    = (S1 РЅФ a_Y.map ╬┤_{M,N} РЅФ S3(M,N) РЅФ S4(M,N)) РЅФ a_Y.map (a.val^* РіЌ b.val^*).
  -- Split `a_Y.map (╬┤ РЅФ ¤є)` and right-associate so S1 and `a_Y.map ╬┤_{M,N}` are common prefixes.
  erw [Functor.map_comp]
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  -- Peel the common S1 (`.hom.app` vs `.app Рђд .hom`, defeq) and `a_Y.map ╬┤_{M,N}` via `rfl` legs.
  refine congr_argРѓѓ (┬и РЅФ ┬и) rfl ?_
  refine congr_argРѓѓ (┬и РЅФ ┬и) rfl ?_
  -- Residual (key): a_Y.map (Fp.map a.val РіЌ Fp.map b.val) РЅФ S3(M',N') РЅФ S4(M',N')
  --              = S3(M,N) РЅФ S4(M,N) РЅФ a_Y.map (a.val^* РіЌ b.val^*).
  -- Square 3: naturality of `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` (reassoc form, post-composed by S4(M',N')).
  erw [reassoc_of% (sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_natural
    ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).map a.val)
    ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).map b.val))]
  dsimp only [CategoryTheory.Sheaf.val]
  -- Now: S3(M,N) РЅФ a_Y.map (forget(a_Y(Fp a.val)) РіЌ forget(a_Y(Fp b.val))) РЅФ S4(M',N')
  --    = S3(M,N) РЅФ a_Y.map (forget(pullbackValIso M).hom РіЌ forget(pullbackValIso N).hom) РЅФ a_Y.map (a^* РіЌ b^*).
  -- `erw [Category.assoc]` bridges the `Sheaf.val`/`.obj` defeq gap in the connecting object
  -- (`pullbackValIso`'s type carries `Y.ringCatSheaf.val`, the helper carries `.obj`); plain `rw`
  -- cannot see the `(f РЅФ g) РЅФ h` pattern across this gap.
  erw [Category.assoc]
  -- Cancel the common `S3(M,N)` iso prefix, then merge each side's two `a_Y.map`s into a single
  -- `a_Y.map (_ РЅФ _)` via `Functor.map_comp` (applied as defeq-matched TERMS so `refine`'s `isDefEq`
  -- bridges the same `.val`/`.obj` gap that blocks `rw`).
  erw [Iso.cancel_iso_hom_left]
  refine ((Functor.map_comp _ _ _).symm.trans ?_).trans (Functor.map_comp _ _ _)
  congr 1
  -- Square 4 (presheaf-level): bifunctoriality of `РіЌ` + naturality of `pullbackValIso` per leg.
  --   (forget(a_Y(Fp a.val)) РіЌ forget(a_Y(Fp b.val))) РЅФ (forget(pullbackValIso M').hom РіЌ forget(pullbackValIso N').hom)
  -- = (forget(pullbackValIso M).hom РіЌ forget(pullbackValIso N).hom) РЅФ (a^*.val РіЌ b^*.val).
  -- Per-leg naturality of `pullbackValIso` (= `pullbackValIso_hom_natural` under `forget`): merge the two
  -- `forget.map`s, apply the sheaf-level naturality, split back.  `((pullback f).map u).val` is `forget`
  -- of `(pullback f).map u`, so the closing `rfl` discharges the `forget`/`.val` boundary.
  have hleg : Рѕђ {P P' : X.Modules} (u : P РЪХ P'),
      (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ Y.ringCatSheaf.obj)).map
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).map u.val)) РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f P').hom
        = (SheafOfModules.forget Y.ringCatSheaf).map (pullbackValIso f P).hom РЅФ
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map u).val := by
    intro P P' u
    rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
    erw [pullbackValIso_hom_natural]
    rw [Functor.map_comp]
    rfl
  -- Split the LHS `tensorHom`-composite by bifunctoriality, rewrite each leg by `hleg`, reassemble into
  -- the RHS `tensorHom`-composite.  `(C := Рђд)` pins the monoidal instance on the `РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` carrier;
  -- `erw` bridges the `Sheaf.val`/`.obj` connecting-object gap that blocks a plain `rw [hleg Рђд]`.
  refine (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) _ _ _ _).trans ?_
  erw [hleg a, hleg b]
  exact (MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom
    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) _ _ _ _).symm

/-- **Sq2 prerequisite Рђћ ring-map reconciliation.** For composable `h : Z РЪХ Y`, `f : Y РЪХ X`,

the oplax `comp_╬┤` decomposition (Sq2 of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`). -/

    (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f)).hom =
      (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom РЅФ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op.whiskerLeft (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom := by
  rfl

    {C D E : Type u} [Category.{u} C] [Category.{u} D] [Category.{u} E]
    {F : C РЦц D} {G : D РЦц E}
    {SРѓђ : Cрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}} {RРѓђ : Dрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}} {TРѓђ : Eрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}}
    (¤є : (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ

    (¤ѕ : (RРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ

    [(PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤ѕ).IsRightAdjoint]

private lemma pullbackComp_╬┤
    {C D E : Type u} [Category.{u} C] [Category.{u} D] [Category.{u} E]
    {F : C РЦц D} {G : D РЦц E}
    {SРѓђ : Cрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}} {RРѓђ : Dрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}} {TРѓђ : Eрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}}
    (¤є : (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      F.op РІЎ (RРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (¤ѕ : (RРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      G.op РІЎ (TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
    [(PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є).IsRightAdjoint]
    [(PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤ѕ).IsRightAdjoint]
    (M N : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
        (PresheafOfModules.pullback (F := F РІЎ G)
          (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ)) M N =
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).inv.app (M РіЌ N) РЅФ
        Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
          (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є РІЎ PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤ѕ) M N РЅФ
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).hom.app M РіЌРѓў
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).hom.app N) := by
  -- MATE CALCULUS (iter-259 derivation; reduces Sq2b to `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`).
  -- Transpose both sides under `a¤Є.homEquiv` (`a¤Є := pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (¤є РЅФ F.op РЌЂ ¤ѕ)`):
  apply (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
    (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
    (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ)).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective
  -- Both sides become `a¤Є.unit (MРіЌN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (Рђд)`:
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  -- The remaining reduction (verified on paper; the wiring `rw`s are mechanical but fragile, and
  -- the *only* genuine gap is `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`, which is `rfl`-FALSE Рђћ see below):
  --
  --   LHS = a¤Є.unit(MРіЌN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (╬┤ (pullback ¤Є) M N)
  --       = (a¤Є.unit M РіЌРѓў a¤Є.unit N) РЅФ ╬╝(pushforward ¤Є) (pullback ¤Є M) (pullback ¤Є N)
  --                                          [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ (adj := a¤Є)]
  --
  --   RHS = a¤Є.unit(MРіЌN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.inv(MРіЌN) РЅФ comp_╬┤ РЅФ (c.hom M РіЌРѓў c.hom N))
  --       where c := pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ.  Expand `map_comp`, then:
  --   (MATE)   a¤Є.unit(MРіЌN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.inv(MРіЌN)) = aC.unit(MРіЌN)
  --                              [Adjunction.unit_conjugateEquiv + conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv;
  --                               here pushforwardComp = Iso.refl РЄњ the conjugate of c.inv is ­ЮЪЎ, so the
  --                               `pc.hom` factor vanishes]   (aC := a¤є.comp a¤ѕ)
  --   (U-C)    aC.unit(MРіЌN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤ѕ РІЎ pushforward ¤є).map (comp_╬┤) =
  --              (aC.unit M РіЌРѓў aC.unit N) РЅФ ╬╝(pushforward ¤ѕ РІЎ pushforward ¤є) (LM) (LN)
  --                              [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ (adj := aC); aC.IsMonoidal via
  --                               Adjunction.isMonoidal_comp; (pushforward ¤Є).map РЅА (G'РІЎG).map defeq]
  --   (╬╝-NAT)  ╬╝(pushforward ¤Є) (LM)(LN) РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.hom M РіЌРѓў c.hom N) =
  --              ((pushforward ¤Є).map (c.hom M) РіЌРѓў (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.hom N)) РЅФ
  --                ╬╝(pushforward ¤Є) (pullback ¤Є M) (pullback ¤Є N)   [Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝_natural]
  --   (TRI)    aC.unit P РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.hom P) = a¤Є.unit P   [(MATE) + c.inv РЅФ c.hom = ­ЮЪЎ]
  --   tensorHom_comp_tensorHom merges the three РіЌРѓў legs; with (TRI) the RHS becomes
  --              (a¤Є.unit M РіЌРѓў a¤Є.unit N) РЅФ ╬╝(pushforward ¤ѕ РІЎ pushforward ¤є) (pullback ¤Є M)(pullback ¤Є N).
  --
  -- LHS = RHS then holds IFF
  --   ╬╝(pushforward ¤ѕ РІЎ pushforward ¤є) X Y = ╬╝(pushforward ¤Є) X Y   (= `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`).
  -- This is the SOLE residual.  It is NOT `rfl` (the `d3sq2b258` recipe's "rfl/short ext" prediction
  -- is empirically false): it is a genuine `ModuleCat` change-of-rings base-change coherence
  -- (`ModuleCat.restrictScalarsComp` / `homEquiv_extendScalarsComp`), with NO analog in the
  -- `rfl`-closed unit twin `unitToPushforwardObjUnit_comp`.  Pinned as `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝` above.
  -- The mate-`rw` wiring of the steps above is left for the follow-up (each step's Mathlib lemma is
  -- named); the reduction itself is complete.  The LHS step (U) is wired here:
  erw [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤
    (adj := PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
      (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ))]
  -- (MATE): the conjugate/mate of `pullbackComp.inv` is `pushforwardComp.hom = ­ЮЪЎ`.
  -- (MATE) Рђћ the conjugate of `pullbackComp.inv` is `pushforwardComp.hom = ­ЮЪЎ`:
  have hconj : conjugateEquiv
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є).comp
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤ѕ))
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
          (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ))
        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).inv = ­ЮЪЎ _ := by
    simp only [PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp, Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv,
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardComp, Iso.refl_hom]
  have hmate : Рѕђ (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)),
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
          (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
          (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ)).unit.app P РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforward (F := F РІЎ G)
          (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).inv.app P) =

        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤ѕ)).unit.app P := by
    intro P

        (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤ѕ))
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ))
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).inv P

  -- (U-C): rewrite `aC.unit(MРіЌN) РЅФ map(comp_╬┤)` via the mate of the composite adjunction `aC`:
  erw [reassoc_of% (Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤
    (adj := (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є).comp
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤ѕ)) M N)]
  -- (╬╝-COH): replace the composite-pushforward ╬╝ by the ¤Є-pushforward ╬╝ (the genuine residual):
  rw [pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝ ¤є ¤ѕ]
  -- (TRI): for any `P`, `aC.unit P РЅФ (pushforward ¤Є).map (c.hom P) = a¤Є.unit P`.
  have htri : Рѕђ (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)),
      ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є).comp
          (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤ѕ)).unit.app P РЅФ

          (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) (¤є РЅФ F.op.whiskerLeft ¤ѕ)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).hom.app P) =
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        (F := F РІЎ G) (R := TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)

    erw [(PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є ¤ѕ).inv_hom_id_app P, CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id,

  conv_lhs => rw [Рєљ htri M, Рєљ htri N]

    (C := _root_.PresheafOfModules (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))]

/-- **Sheaf-level conjugate/mate of `pullbackComp.inv` (the R0-peel building block for Sq1).**
For composable scheme morphisms `h : Z РЪХ Y`, `f : Y РЪХ X` and any `Q : X.Modules`, the unit of the
composite-pullback adjunction `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (h РЅФ f)`, post-composed with the
pushforward of `pullbackComp.inv`, equals the unit of the *composite* of the `f`- and `h`-adjunctions,
post-composed with `pushforwardComp.hom`.  This is the `Scheme.Modules` (sheaf-level) instance of
`unit_conjugateEquiv` combined with `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (the mate of `pullbackComp.inv`
is `pushforwardComp.hom`); it is the cheap, sheafification-free piece of the Sq1 mate calculus that
peels the leading `R0 = pullbackComp.inv` factor.  Extracted from the inline `conj` of
`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` so the (expensive, sheafification-laden) Sq1 reassembly can cite it
directly.  Project-local. -/
lemma sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}}
    (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X) (Q : X.Modules) :
    (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f))).unit.app Q РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.pushforward (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f))).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv.app Q) =
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).comp
          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction h)).unit.app Q РЅФ
        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp h f).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f РІЎ Scheme.Modules.pullback h).obj Q) := by
  have conj := unit_conjugateEquiv
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).comp
      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction h))
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (h РЅФ f))
    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv Q
  rw [Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv] at conj
  exact conj.symm

/-- **STEP-1 bridge (presheafРєћsheaf pushforward compatibility, the binding obligation of the D3Рђ▓
Sq1 tail).** The forgetful functor `SheafOfModules.forget` intertwines the sheaf-level
`SheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є` with the presheaf-level `PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є.hom`:
for any morphism `g` of sheaves of modules over `R`,
`forget.map ((pushforward ¤є).map g) = (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є.hom).map (forget.map g)`.

This is the compatibility named in the blueprint's `lem:pullback_tensor_map_basechange` Sq1-tail
binding-obligation paragraph: it is what lets the recovered sheaf-level `B_f`/`B_h` unit factors
(which live under `SheafOfModules.pushforward`) be slid across into the presheaf-level
`PresheafOfModules.pushforward` of the unit identity.  It is *definitional* Рђћ `SheafOfModules.pushforward`
is built sectionwise from `PresheafOfModules.pushforward` (`pushforward_map_val`) and `forget` is the
`.val` projection (`forget_map`), so the two sides are equal by `rfl`. -/
private lemma forget_map_pushforward_map
    {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {D : Type u} [Category.{u} D]
    {J : GrothendieckTopology C} {K : GrothendieckTopology D} {F : C РЦц D}
    {S : Sheaf J RingCat.{u}} {R : Sheaf K RingCat.{u}} [Functor.IsContinuous F J K]
    (¤є : S РЪХ (F.sheafPushforwardContinuous RingCat.{u} J K).obj R)
    {A B : SheafOfModules.{u} R} (g : A РЪХ B) :
    (SheafOfModules.forget S).map ((SheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є).map g) =
      (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є.hom).map ((SheafOfModules.forget R).map g) := by
  rfl

/-! ### PROTOTYPE (d3cocycle006): NatTrans-level cocycle for `sheafificationCompPullback`.
Proved at the natural-transformation level via two instances of

with `.app P` evaluated exactly once at the end.  Relocated above

/-- The identity-sheafification functor of a scheme `W` (the `a_W` of the D3Рђ▓ unit square),
pre-elaborated once so that statements mentioning it for several schemes at once do not

private noncomputable abbrev sheafifyIdOf (W : Scheme.{u}) :=
  PresheafOfModules.sheafification.{u} (R := W.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ W.ringCatSheaf.val)

set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
/-- **NatTrans-level composition coherence of `SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback`.**

internalized in `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompNatTrans_assoc`). Project-local. -/
private lemma sheafificationCompPullback_comp_natTrans {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}}
    (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X) :
    (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f))).hom =
      Functor.whiskerLeft (sheafifyIdOf X) (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp h f).inv РЅФ
      Functor.whiskerRight
        (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).hom
        (Scheme.Modules.pullback h) РЅФ
      Functor.whiskerLeft (PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom)
        (SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).hom РЅФ

  let adj23 := SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)

  let adj03 := (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction

  let ¤ё013' :

            PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars.{u} (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)) РІЎ
          PresheafOfModules.pushforward.{u} (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f)).hom) РЪХ
