    congr_app (Adjunction.leftAdjointCompNatTrans_assoc
      adj01 adj12 adj23 adj02 adj13 adj03 ¤ё012 ¤ё123 ¤ё013 ¤ё023 h¤ё) P
  apply ((PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (R := X.ringCatSheaf)
    (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).comp
      (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
        (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f)))).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective
  rw [sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq]
  erw [Adjunction.homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app]
  -- LHS is now `B_{hРЅФf}.unit.app P` (B := (PrPbPushAdj ¤є'_{hРЅФf}).comp (sheafAdj_Z)).  Expand BOTH
  -- composite-adjunction units (`homEquiv_unit` on the RHS, `comp_unit_app` on both) so the goal is
  -- the concrete UNIT-LEVEL identity
  --   (PrPbPushAdj ¤є'_{hРЅФf}).unit P РЅФ (pushforward ¤є'_{hРЅФf}).map (sheafAdj_Z.unit (pullback ¤є'_{hРЅФf} P))
  --     = (sheafAdj_X.unit P РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestrictScalars).map ((ShPbPushAdj (hРЅФf)).unit (a_X P)))
  --        РЅФ (pushforward (hРЅФf) РІЎ forgetРІЎrestrictScalars).map (R0 РЅФ R1 РЅФ R5 РЅФ a_Z.map ╬┤_pre),
  -- where R0 = (pullbackComp h f).inv, R1 = (pullback h).map (sheafCompPb f .app P).hom,
  -- R5 = (sheafCompPb h .app (PrPb_f P)).hom, ╬┤_pre = (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤є'_f ¤є'_h).hom.app P.
  -- REMAINING (the genuine residual): transport the two `pullbackComp` factors across the adjunctions
  -- Рђћ sheaf `pullbackComp h f` via `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` / `unit_conjugateEquiv`
  -- (`pushforwardComp = Iso.refl`, exactly as in `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` L920), and the
  -- presheaf `pullbackComp ¤є'_f ¤є'_h` sheafified Рђћ re-expressing R0/R1/R5/╬┤_pre under the right-adjoint
  -- `map` as the f- and h-unit factors (`homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` recovers each
  -- `sheafCompPb _ .app _ .hom` as a `B_┬и.unit`), then collapse via `comp_unit_app` +
  -- `Adjunction.unit_naturality` to the LHS `B_{hРЅФf}.unit`.  This is the `sheafificationCompPullback`
  -- twin of the `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` mate calculus (L910); the concrete unit identity above is
  -- the reduced goal handed to the next iteration.
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, Adjunction.comp_unit_app]
  -- ITER-262 (prover) Рђћ VERIFIED forward step.  The `conv_rhs` distribution below is the
  -- contamination-free way to expose the four RHS factors: a plain `erw [Functor.map_comp]` on the
  -- whole goal instead rewrites the *LHS* `sheafAdj_Z.unit` into its `toSheafify РЅФ restrictHomEquiv`
  -- expansion (and `rw [Functor.map_comp]` does not fire Рђћ the outer functor is a defeq-but-not-
  -- syntactic composite, and the unconfined `erw` `whnf`-times-out).  Confining the rewrites to the
  -- RHS with `conv_rhs` distributes the outer `(pushforward (hРЅФf) РІЎ forget РІЎ restr).map` over the
  -- four-factor composite and pushes the leading `pushforward (hРЅФf)` inside via `Functor.comp_map`.
  -- After it the RHS reads
  --   (sheafAdj_X.unit P РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestr).map (ShPbPushAdj(hРЅФf).unit (a_X P)))
  --     РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestr).map ((pushforward (hРЅФf)).map R0)
  --     РЅФ (pushforward (hРЅФf) РІЎ forgetРІЎrestr).map (R1 РЅФ R5 РЅФ a_Z.map ╬┤_pre),
  -- so the second and third factors are now BOTH `(forgetРІЎrestr).map _` and adjacent.
  conv_rhs =>
    erw [Functor.map_comp]
    erw [Functor.comp_map (SheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f)))]
  -- ITER-262 (prover) Рђћ R0 PEELED.  Merge the two adjacent `(forgetРІЎrestr).map _` factors and peel
  -- the leading `R0 = (pullbackComp h f).inv` by the building block.  Plain `rw [Category.assoc]` does
  -- NOT re-expose the `(f РЅФ g) РЅФ h` head, and `slice_rhs` keeps the `comp_unit_app`-glued
  -- `(sheafAdj_X.unit РЅФ A)` as a single factor Рђћ so we derive the merged-and-peeled equation under
  -- `(forgetРІЎrestr).map` via `congrArg` + `Functor.map_comp`, then splice it in with `reassoc_of%`
  -- (which matches the `A РЅФ (B' РЅФ rest)` association in place).
  -- `key` IS the merged-and-peeled R0 equation, PROVEN (axiom-clean) and in the goal's exact spelling:
  --   `(forgetРІЎrestr).map (ShPbPushAdj(hРЅФf).unit (a_X P)) РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestr).map ((pushforward (hРЅФf)).map R0)
  --     = (forgetРІЎrestr).map ((ShPbPushAdj f .comp ShPbPushAdj h).unit (a_X P) РЅФ pushforwardComp.hom _)`,
  -- obtained by mapping the building block `sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv` under
  -- `(forgetРІЎrestr).map` and splitting with `Functor.map_comp`.  Its LHS is precisely the 2nd РЅФ 3rd RHS
  -- factors of the goal.
  have key := congrArg
    (SheafOfModules.forget X.ringCatSheaf РІЎ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).map
    (sheaf_unit_comp_pushforward_pullbackComp_inv h f
      ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val X.ringCatSheaf))).obj P))
  rw [Functor.map_comp] at key
  -- SPLICE `key` IN (R0-peel).  `simp only [Functor.comp_map]` puts goal + `key` in the same unfolded
  -- `restrictScalars.map (forget.map _)` normal form; `erw [Category.assoc]` (NOT `rw`/`simp` Рђћ the
  -- intermediate objects are defeq-but-not-syntactic `Functor.obj` applications, so only `erw`'s
  -- defeq-implicit matching flattens the `comp_unit_app`-glued `(sheafAdj_X.unit РЅФ A)`) right-associates
  -- the RHS; `erw [reassoc_of% key]` then rewrites `A РЅФ (B' РЅФ C)` Рєњ `merged РЅФ C`, replacing the leading
  -- `R0 = (pullbackComp h f).inv` factor by the composite `f`/`h`-adjunction unit + `pushforwardComp.hom`.
  simp only [Functor.comp_map] at key Ріб
  erw [Category.assoc]
  erw [reassoc_of% key]
  -- R0 PEELED.  Goal RHS now reads (X-side sheafification discharged):
  --   sheafAdj_X.unit P
  --     РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestr).map ((ShPbPushAdj f .comp ShPbPushAdj h).unit (a_X P) РЅФ pushforwardComp.hom _)
  --     РЅФ (forgetРІЎrestr).map ((pushforward (hРЅФf)).map (R1 РЅФ R5 РЅФ a_Z.map ╬┤_pre)),
  -- LHS = `B_{hРЅФf}.unit.app P` = `PrPbPushAdj(¤є'_{hРЅФf}).unit P РЅФ (pushforward ¤є'_{hРЅФf}).map (sheafAdj_Z.unit Рђд)`.
  -- REMAINING TAIL (the analog of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`'s tail, L969-996): recover the two
  -- `sheafCompPb` factors R1 = `(pullback h).map (sheafCompPb f .app P).hom` and
  -- R5 = `(sheafCompPb h .app (PrPb_f P)).hom` as `B_f`/`B_h` units via `homEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`
  -- on their `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq` form, slide `pushforwardComp.hom` past them by
  -- `(pushforwardComp h f).hom.naturality`, and collapse `comp_unit_app` + `Adjunction.unit_naturality`
  -- to `B_{hРЅФf}.unit` Рђћ mirroring `hinner`/`hcomp'` + the final `erw` chain of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`.
  -- MERGE the two adjacent `(forget РІЎ restrictScalars).map _` RHS factors into one (verified `erw`),
  -- then discharge the merged tail by the extracted named lemma.
  erw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp, Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
  exact sheafificationCompPullback_comp_tail h f P

/-- **Brick 1 (Sq-cancellation) Рђћ sheafification kills the presheaf `pullbackComp` homРѕўinv round-trip.**
For composable scheme morphisms `h : Z РЪХ Y`, `f : Y РЪХ X` and any presheaf `T` over `X`, the
sheafification functor `aZ = sheafification (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)` sends the `hom РЅФ inv` round-trip
of the Mathlib presheaf coherence `PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp ¤єf ¤єh` to the identity.  This is the
`D РЅФ E = ­ЮЪЎ` cancellation consumed by step (i) of the four-square interleave in
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (where `D = aZ.map (pbComp.hom.app T)` comes from the Sq1 brick
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp` and `E = aZ.map (pb.inv.app T)` from the Sq2b splice `h╬┤`). -/
private lemma sheafifyMap_pullbackComp_hom_inv_id {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (T : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Z.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
          (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app T) РЅФ
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Z.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
        ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
          (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).inv.app T) = ­ЮЪЎ _ := by
  rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
  erw [Iso.hom_inv_id_app]
  exact (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (R := Z.ringCatSheaf) (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map_id _

/-- **Step-(i) middle-cancellation skeleton (instance-agnostic).** A purely categorical reassociation:
in any category, a 4-fold prefix ending in `d` composed with a tail beginning in its inverse `e`
(`d РЅФ e = ­ЮЪЎ`) collapses the cancelling pair, leaving the prefix glued to the tail.  Stated and proved
generically so every `РЅФ` shares ONE `Category` instance and `Category.assoc` reassociates freely; it is
then `exact`-applied (NOT `rw`-applied) against the concrete D3Рђ▓ goal, where the `sheafificationCompPullback`
/`pullbackComp` `.app`-components compose through DEFEQ-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instances Рђћ
`exact` unifies up to defeq and so crosses the instance gap that blocks every `rw/simp [Category.assoc]`.
This is the device that lands step (i) of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` without the mate-`whnf` bomb. -/
private lemma comp_cancel_mid {C : Type*} [Category C] {AРѓђ BРѓђ CРѓђ DРѓђ EРѓђ FРѓђ : C}
    (r0 : AРѓђ РЪХ BРѓђ) (r1 : BРѓђ РЪХ CРѓђ) (r5 : CРѓђ РЪХ DРѓђ) (d : DРѓђ РЪХ EРѓђ) (e : EРѓђ РЪХ DРѓђ)
    (rest : DРѓђ РЪХ FРѓђ) (hde : d РЅФ e = ­ЮЪЎ DРѓђ) :
    (r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ r5 РЅФ d) РЅФ e РЅФ rest = r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ r5 РЅФ rest := by
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [Рєљ Category.assoc d e rest, hde, Category.id_comp]

/-- **Generic nested slide (mirrors the post-step-(ii) goal nesting exactly).** Substitutes the
buried pair `r5 РЅФ p` (the `S1^h`-then-`a.map (Fp_h.map ╬┤_f)` factor) by `u РЅФ v` through a different
intermediate object `d'`, leaving the post-substitution equation as the residual goal.  Applied by
`refine comp_slide_nested Рђд hslide ?_`: the conclusion is written to mirror the goal's *literal*
parenthesisation `(r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ r5 РЅФ (p РЅФ q) РЅФ rtc) РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4`, so `refine` unifies it against the
goal by *metavariable assignment only* Рђћ no keyed `simp`/`rw`/`erw` matching, hence no
`whnf`-bomb across the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance boundary (the same reason
`comp_cancel_mid` lands step (i) by `exact`).  The actual `rw` runs on this lemma's own
single-`[Category C]` variables, where assoc is trivial. -/
private lemma comp_slide_nested {C : Type*} [Category C] {a b c d e k m n g d' : C}
    (r0 : a РЪХ b) (r1 : b РЪХ c) (r5 : c РЪХ d) (p : d РЪХ e) (q : e РЪХ k) (rtc : k РЪХ m)
    (s3 : m РЪХ n) (s4 : n РЪХ g) (u : c РЪХ d') (v : d' РЪХ e) (rhs : a РЪХ g)
    (hsl : r5 РЅФ p = u РЅФ v)
    (hrest : (r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ (u РЅФ v) РЅФ q РЅФ rtc) РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = rhs) :
    (r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ r5 РЅФ (p РЅФ q) РЅФ rtc) РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = rhs := by
  have hassoc : r5 РЅФ (p РЅФ q) РЅФ rtc = (r5 РЅФ p) РЅФ q РЅФ rtc := by
    simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [hassoc, hsl]; exact hrest

/-- **Generic three-prefix cancellation across an L/R-defeq boundary.** The post-slide D3Рђ▓ residual
has the form `(r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ (u РЅФ v) РЅФ q РЅФ rtc) РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = r0' РЅФ (m1 РЅФ m2 РЅФ m3 РЅФ m4) РЅФ Рђд` where the
first three left factors `r0,r1,u` are *defeq-but-not-syntactically-equal* to the first three right
factors `r0',m1,m2` (the `SheafOfModules` vs `Scheme.Modules` pullback spellings).  Passing `rfl` for
`hr0/hr1/hu` discharges those leaf defeqs (small terms Рђћ no big-composite `whnf`), then the generic
`subst`+assoc reduces the goal to the pure `hcore` (the merged Sq3/Sq4 chase).  Applied by
`refine comp_cancel_three_lr Рђд rfl rfl rfl ?_`. -/
private lemma comp_cancel_three_lr {C : Type*} [Category C]
    {a b cc c' e kk mm nn g c4 c5 c6 c7 c8 c9 : C}
    (r0 : a РЪХ b) (r1 : b РЪХ cc) (u : cc РЪХ c') (v : c' РЪХ e) (q : e РЪХ kk) (rtc : kk РЪХ mm)
    (s3 : mm РЪХ nn) (s4 : nn РЪХ g)
    (r0' : a РЪХ b) (m1 : b РЪХ cc) (m2 : cc РЪХ c') (m3 : c' РЪХ c4) (m4 : c4 РЪХ c5) (vv : c5 РЪХ c6)
    (dh : c6 РЪХ c7) (sh3 : c7 РЪХ c8) (sh4 : c8 РЪХ c9) (tf : c9 РЪХ g)
    (hr0 : r0 = r0') (hr1 : r1 = m1) (hu : u = m2)
    (hcore : v РЅФ q РЅФ rtc РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = m3 РЅФ m4 РЅФ vv РЅФ dh РЅФ sh3 РЅФ sh4 РЅФ tf) :
    (r0 РЅФ r1 РЅФ (u РЅФ v) РЅФ q РЅФ rtc) РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4
      = r0' РЅФ (m1 РЅФ m2 РЅФ m3 РЅФ m4) РЅФ vv РЅФ dh РЅФ sh3 РЅФ sh4 РЅФ tf := by
  subst hr0 hr1 hu
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [hcore]

/-- **Generic slide-then-cancel for the merged Sq3/Sq4 core (instance-agnostic).** The
post-`comp_cancel_three_lr` residual of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` has the form
`v РЅФ q РЅФ rtc РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = m3 РЅФ m4 РЅФ vv РЅФ dh РЅФ sh3 РЅФ sh4 РЅФ tf`, where the RHS prefix
`m3 РЅФ m4 РЅФ vv` (`= (pullback h).map S3_f РЅФ (pullback h).map S4_f РЅФ S1_h''`) equals, by the
naturality of the connecting iso `sheafificationCompPullback h` at the morphism `gg`
(`a_Y.map gg = S3_f РЅФ S4_f`), the slid form `v РЅФ vtail` with `v = S1_h` (presheaf args) and
`vtail = a_Z.map (Fp_h.map gg)`.  Splicing that equation (`hcomb`) plus the resulting folded
presheaf core (`hcore2`) closes the goal.  Stated generically over one `[Category C]` so the
`subst`/`assoc` algebra never crosses the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance
boundary that whnf-bombs `simp`/`rw`/`erw` on the concrete goal; applied by
`refine comp_slide_three Рђд hcomb ?_` (assignment-only unification). -/
private lemma comp_slide_three {C : Type*} [Category C]
    {a b b3 c1 c2 c3 d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 g : C}
    (v : a РЪХ b) (q : b РЪХ c1) (rtc : c1 РЪХ c2) (s3 : c2 РЪХ c3) (s4 : c3 РЪХ g)
    (m3 : a РЪХ d1) (m4 : d1 РЪХ d2) (vv : d2 РЪХ b3) (dh : b3 РЪХ d3) (sh3 : d3 РЪХ d4)
    (sh4 : d4 РЪХ d5) (tf : d5 РЪХ g) (vtail : b РЪХ b3)
    (hcomb : m3 РЅФ m4 РЅФ vv = v РЅФ vtail)
    (hcore2 : q РЅФ rtc РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = vtail РЅФ dh РЅФ sh3 РЅФ sh4 РЅФ tf) :
    v РЅФ q РЅФ rtc РЅФ s3 РЅФ s4 = m3 РЅФ m4 РЅФ vv РЅФ dh РЅФ sh3 РЅФ sh4 РЅФ tf := by
  rw [hcore2, Рєљ Category.assoc v vtail, Рєљ hcomb]
  simp only [Category.assoc]

/-- **Generic merge-then-slide for the `hcomb` leg (instance-agnostic).** Over an abstract functor
`G`, `G.map s3f РЅФ G.map s4f РЅФ vv` merges (`Functor.map_comp`) and rewrites by `hg : gmap = s3f РЅФ s4f`
to `G.map gmap РЅФ vv`, closed by the naturality `hnat`.  Stated generically so the `assoc`/`map_comp`
algebra runs on clean abstract variables, never crossing the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules`
instance boundary that whnf-bombs `rw [Рєљ Category.assoc]` / `rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete
post-step-(ii) goal; applied by `exact map_comp_slide G _ _ gmap _ _ hg hnat`. -/
private lemma map_comp_slide {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (G : C РЦц D)
    {x y z : C} {w : D} (s3f : x РЪХ y) (s4f : y РЪХ z) (gmap : x РЪХ z)
    (vv : G.obj z РЪХ w) (rhs : G.obj x РЪХ w)
    (hg : gmap = s3f РЅФ s4f) (hnat : G.map gmap РЅФ vv = rhs) :
    G.map s3f РЅФ G.map s4f РЅФ vv = rhs := by
  have e : G.map s3f РЅФ G.map s4f = G.map gmap := by rw [hg, Functor.map_comp]
  calc G.map s3f РЅФ G.map s4f РЅФ vv
        = (G.map s3f РЅФ G.map s4f) РЅФ vv := by rw [Category.assoc]
    _ = G.map gmap РЅФ vv := by rw [e]
    _ = rhs := hnat

/-- **Generic fold-4-vs-5-under-a-functor reduction (instance-agnostic).** A 4-fold `F.map`-composite
equals a 5-fold `F.map`-composite as soon as the underlying presheaf composites agree (`hcore`).  The
`Рєљ Functor.map_comp` merge runs on this lemma's own clean `[Category C]` variables, where the
discrimination-tree match is trivial; it is then applied to the merged Sq3/Sq4 core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` by `refine map_comp4_eq_comp5 _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ?_`
(assignment-only unification), crossing the defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules` instance boundary
that whnf-bombs `simp`/`rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete folded goal. -/
private lemma map_comp4_eq_comp5 {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C РЦц D)
    {xРѓђ xРѓЂ xРѓѓ xРѓЃ xРѓё : C} (aРѓЂ : xРѓђ РЪХ xРѓЂ) (aРѓѓ : xРѓЂ РЪХ xРѓѓ) (aРѓЃ : xРѓѓ РЪХ xРѓЃ) (aРѓё : xРѓЃ РЪХ xРѓё)
    {zРѓЂ zРѓѓ zРѓЃ zРѓё : C} (bРѓЂ : xРѓђ РЪХ zРѓЂ) (bРѓѓ : zРѓЂ РЪХ zРѓѓ) (bРѓЃ : zРѓѓ РЪХ zРѓЃ) (bРѓё : zРѓЃ РЪХ zРѓё) (bРѓЁ : zРѓё РЪХ xРѓё)
    (hcore : aРѓЂ РЅФ aРѓѓ РЅФ aРѓЃ РЅФ aРѓё = bРѓЂ РЅФ bРѓѓ РЅФ bРѓЃ РЅФ bРѓё РЅФ bРѓЁ) :
    F.map aРѓЂ РЅФ F.map aРѓѓ РЅФ F.map aРѓЃ РЅФ F.map aРѓё
      = F.map bРѓЂ РЅФ F.map bРѓѓ РЅФ F.map bРѓЃ РЅФ F.map bРѓё РЅФ F.map bРѓЁ := by
  simp only [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]
  rw [hcore]

/-- **Generic bifunctorial collapse of a 3-vs-4 `tensorHom` chain to its two legs (instance-agnostic).**
A 3-fold composite of `tensorHom`s equals a 4-fold one as soon as the two underlying leg composites
agree (`hM`, `hN`).  The `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` interchange runs on this lemma's own clean
`[MonoidalCategory C]` variables, then it is applied to the merged Sq3/Sq4 core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` by `refine tensorHom_collapse_3_4 Рђд ?_ ?_` (assignment-only unification),
crossing the non-canonical `MonoidalCategoryStruct` instance baked into the concrete goal on which
`simp`/`rw [tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]` makes no progress. -/
private lemma tensorHom_collapse_3_4 {C : Type*} [Category C] [MonoidalCategory C]
    {xMРѓђ xMРѓЂ xMРѓѓ xMРѓЃ xNРѓђ xNРѓЂ xNРѓѓ xNРѓЃ : C}
    (pРѓЂ : xMРѓђ РЪХ xMРѓЂ) (pРѓѓ : xMРѓЂ РЪХ xMРѓѓ) (pРѓЃ : xMРѓѓ РЪХ xMРѓЃ)
    (qРѓЂ : xNРѓђ РЪХ xNРѓЂ) (qРѓѓ : xNРѓЂ РЪХ xNРѓѓ) (qРѓЃ : xNРѓѓ РЪХ xNРѓЃ)
    {yMРѓЂ yMРѓѓ yMРѓЃ yNРѓЂ yNРѓѓ yNРѓЃ : C}
    (rРѓЂ : xMРѓђ РЪХ yMРѓЂ) (rРѓѓ : yMРѓЂ РЪХ yMРѓѓ) (rРѓЃ : yMРѓѓ РЪХ yMРѓЃ) (rРѓё : yMРѓЃ РЪХ xMРѓЃ)
    (sРѓЂ : xNРѓђ РЪХ yNРѓЂ) (sРѓѓ : yNРѓЂ РЪХ yNРѓѓ) (sРѓЃ : yNРѓѓ РЪХ yNРѓЃ) (sРѓё : yNРѓЃ РЪХ xNРѓЃ)
    (hM : pРѓЂ РЅФ pРѓѓ РЅФ pРѓЃ = rРѓЂ РЅФ rРѓѓ РЅФ rРѓЃ РЅФ rРѓё)
    (hN : qРѓЂ РЅФ qРѓѓ РЅФ qРѓЃ = sРѓЂ РЅФ sРѓѓ РЅФ sРѓЃ РЅФ sРѓё) :
    MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pРѓЂ qРѓЂ РЅФ MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pРѓѓ qРѓѓ РЅФ
        MonoidalCategory.tensorHom pРѓЃ qРѓЃ
      = MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rРѓЂ sРѓЂ РЅФ MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rРѓѓ sРѓѓ РЅФ
          MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rРѓЃ sРѓЃ РЅФ MonoidalCategory.tensorHom rРѓё sРѓё := by
  simp only [MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom, hM, hN]

/-- **Generic adjunction unit-counit triangle (instance-agnostic).** For an adjunction `L РіБ R` and
any `k : L.obj P РЪХ M`, sheafifying the unit-into-`R k` composite and post-composing the counit
recovers `k`.  This is the abstract triangle identity behind the `pullbackValIso` counit reassembly
(blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp_counit`, the (T) step): with `L = sheafification`,
`R = forget`, `P = pullback presheaf`, `M = sheaf pullback`, `k = (pullbackValIso _ _).hom`, it states
`a(╬и РЅФ forget k) РЅФ ╬х = k`.  Stated generically over one pair `[Category C]`/`[Category D]` so the
`Functor.map_comp`/`counit_naturality`/`left_triangle_components` algebra never crosses the
defeq-but-not-syntactic `SheafOfModules`/`Scheme.Modules` instance boundary; applied by `exact`. -/
private lemma adj_unit_map_counit {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] {L : C РЦц D} {R : D РЦц C}
    (adj : L РіБ R) (P : C) (M : D) (k : L.obj P РЪХ M) :
    L.map (adj.unit.app P РЅФ R.map k) РЅФ adj.counit.app M = k :=
  (adj.homEquiv P M).left_inv k

/-- **Generic forget-image cocycle reassembly (instance-agnostic).** Given the sheaf-level cocycle
`x РЅФ y = x' РЅФ y' РЅФ z'` in `C`, its `F`-image, prefixed by any `╬и`, reassembles as the matching
forget-image composite.  Stated over one `[Category C]`/`[Category D]` so the `Functor.map_comp`
merges run on clean abstract variables; applied to the concrete D3Рђ▓ reduction goal by `exact`, whose
defeq unification crosses the `Sheaf.val`/`ObjectProperty.obj` (deprecated-alias) boundary that
blocks `rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]` on the concrete forget-images.  This is the (T)/(H)Рєњgoal bridge in
`pullbackValIso_comp_leg` (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`). -/
private lemma comp_forget_cocycle {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C РЦц D)
    {a b c a' d' : C} {Wd : D} (╬и : Wd РЪХ F.obj a) (x : a РЪХ b) (y : b РЪХ c)
    (x' : a РЪХ a') (y' : a' РЪХ d') (z' : d' РЪХ c) (h : x РЅФ y = x' РЅФ y' РЅФ z') :
    ╬и РЅФ F.map x РЅФ F.map y = ╬и РЅФ F.map x' РЅФ F.map y' РЅФ F.map z' := by
  rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp, h, Functor.map_comp, Functor.map_comp]

/-- **Generic interleaved 3-pair telescope (instance-agnostic).** A palindromic composite collapses to
its centre `g` once the three nested pairs cancel (`AРЅФA' = BРЅФB' = CРЅФC' = ­ЮЪЎ`).  Stated over one
`[Category C]` so the `Category.assoc` flattening runs on clean abstract variables Рђћ never on the
`SheafOfModules` carrier where `simp/rw [Category.assoc]` whnf-bombs Рђћ then applied to the inverse of
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp` by `exact`.  This is the Sq4a telescope of
`sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv`. -/
private lemma inv_telescope {C : Type*} [Category C] {w x y z t : C}
    (A : w РЪХ x) (A' : x РЪХ w) (B : x РЪХ y) (B' : y РЪХ x) (Cc : y РЪХ z) (C' : z РЪХ y) (g : w РЪХ t)
    (hA : A РЅФ A' = ­ЮЪЎ w) (hB : B РЅФ B' = ­ЮЪЎ x) (hC : Cc РЅФ C' = ­ЮЪЎ y) :
    g = (A РЅФ B РЅФ Cc) РЅФ C' РЅФ B' РЅФ A' РЅФ g := by
  simp only [Category.assoc]
  rw [Рєљ Category.assoc Cc C', hC, Category.id_comp, Рєљ Category.assoc B B', hB, Category.id_comp,
    Рєљ Category.assoc A A', hA, Category.id_comp]

/-- **Generic cocycle assembly (instance-agnostic).** The algebraic skeleton of the `pullbackValIso`
composition coherence `hH` in `pullbackValIso_comp_leg`: the LHS reassembles via the Sq4a inverse
(`h1`) and `pullbackComp` naturality (`h2`); the RHS via `sheafificationCompPullback h` naturality
(`h3`); the two meet through the adjunction triangle `h4`.  Stated over one `[Category C]`/`[Category D]`
with abstract `F` so the `Functor.map_comp` merges and `Category.assoc` reshuffles run on clean
variables (no `SheafOfModules` whnf-bomb); applied by `exact`. -/
private lemma cocycle_assemble {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D] (F : C РЦц D)
    {dA dB dC dD dQ : D} {cP cQ cR cS : C}
    (p : dA РЪХ dB) (sf : dB РЪХ dC) (m1 : dC РЪХ dD)
    (sh : dA РЪХ F.obj cP) (x1 : cP РЪХ cQ) (pa : F.obj cQ РЪХ dC) (x2 : cQ РЪХ cR) (pw : F.obj cR РЪХ dD)
    (q : dA РЪХ dQ) (sQ : dQ РЪХ F.obj cS) (x3 : cP РЪХ cS) (x4 : cS РЪХ cR)
    (h1 : p РЅФ sf = sh РЅФ F.map x1 РЅФ pa) (h2 : pa РЅФ m1 = F.map x2 РЅФ pw)
    (h3 : q РЅФ sQ = sh РЅФ F.map x3) (h4 : x3 РЅФ x4 = x1 РЅФ x2) :
    p РЅФ sf РЅФ m1 = q РЅФ (sQ РЅФ F.map x4) РЅФ pw := by
  rw [reassoc_of% h1, h2, Category.assoc sQ, reassoc_of% h3, Рєљ Category.assoc (F.map x1),
    Рєљ Functor.map_comp, Рєљ Category.assoc (F.map x3), Рєљ Functor.map_comp, h4]

/-- **Step-(ii) Рђћ the `comp_╬┤` split of `╬┤comp` under `a_Z.map`.** The oplax tensorator of the

arguments. This is the mechanical step (ii) of the four-square interleave in
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict`; stated with the same `show Рђд from` ring-map ascriptions as the proof's

private lemma sheafifyMap_╬┤comp_split {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (M N : X.Modules) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
        (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
          (PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom) РІЎ
            PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op РІЎ (Z.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom))
          M.val N.val) =
      (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op РІЎ (Z.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom)).map
            (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
              (PresheafOfModules.pullback
                (show (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                    (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                  from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom))

        (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).map
          (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
            (PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map h.base).op РІЎ (Z.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom))
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom)).obj M.val)
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback
              (show (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
                  (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
                from (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom)).obj N.val)) := by

  -- instance), so after folding the two `a.map`s by `Рєљ Functor.map_comp` the `congr 1` closes by `rfl`.
  rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp]

private lemma sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X)
    (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ Z.ringCatSheaf.val)).map
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
            (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app P) РЅФ
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f))).app P).inv
      = ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).inv РЅФ
          (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
            ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).inv РЅФ
          (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).hom.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) := by
  have hA : ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).inv РЅФ
        ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).app
          ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj P)).hom = ­ЮЪЎ _ :=
    Iso.inv_hom_id _
  have hB : (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
          ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).inv РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).map
          ((SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f)).app P).hom = ­ЮЪЎ _ := by
    rw [Рєљ Functor.map_comp, Iso.inv_hom_id, CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]
  have hC : (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).hom.app
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) РЅФ
        (SheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h)).inv.app
          ((PresheafOfModules.sheafification (­ЮЪЎ X.ringCatSheaf.val)).obj P) = ­ЮЪЎ _ :=
    Iso.hom_inv_id_app _ _
  rw [Iso.comp_inv_eq, sheafificationCompPullback_comp h f P]
  exact inv_telescope _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hA hB hC

/-- **Sq4 Рђћ the per-leg `pullbackValIso` composition coherence** (blueprint `lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`).

underlying presheaf of the pullback" Рђћ `╬и РЅФ forget (pullbackValIso ┬и W).hom` Рђћ composes
pseudofunctorially across `h РЅФ f`, reconciling `pullbackValIso (h РЅФ f)`, `pullbackValIso h`,
`pullbackValIso f`, the presheaf coherence `PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp` and the sheaf coherence
`pullbackComp h f`. This is the single per-leg residual of the merged Sq3/Sq4 presheaf core of
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (applied once for `M` and once for `N`).

(pullback f).mapIso (sheafification counit at W)`; substituting this factorisation on every leg, the

lemma pullbackValIso_comp_leg {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (h : Z РЪХ Y) (f : Y РЪХ X) (W : X.Modules) :
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackComp (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom
          (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom h).hom).hom.app W.val РЅФ
        (PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction (­ЮЪЎ (Sheaf.val Z.ringCatSheaf))).unit.app
            ((PresheafOfModules.pullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (h РЅФ f)).hom).obj W.val) РЅФ

/-- **D3Рђ▓ Рђћ composition coherence of the sheaf-level pullbackРђЊtensor comparison `pullbackTensorMap`**

`pullbackTensorMap (hРЅФf) M N = (pullbackComp h f).inv РЅФ (pullback h).map (pullbackTensorMap f) РЅФ

/-- **Generic middle-factor isolation for a 4-fold composite.** If `a РЅФ b РЅФ c РЅФ d` is an iso
and the three flanking factors `a, c, d` are isos, then the middle factor `b` is an iso.

`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (D3Рђ▓) base-change identity. -/
private lemma isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid {C : Type*} [Category C] {WРѓђ XРѓђ YРѓђ ZРѓђ TРѓђ : C}
    {a : WРѓђ РЪХ XРѓђ} {b : XРѓђ РЪХ YРѓђ} {c : YРѓђ РЪХ ZРѓђ} {d : ZРѓђ РЪХ TРѓђ}
    (h : IsIso (a РЅФ b РЅФ c РЅФ d)) (ha : IsIso a) (hc : IsIso c) (hd : IsIso d) : IsIso b := by
  haveI := h; haveI := ha; haveI := hc; haveI := hd
  haveI : IsIso (b РЅФ c РЅФ d) := IsIso.of_isIso_comp_left a (b РЅФ c РЅФ d)
  exact IsIso.of_isIso_comp_right b (c РЅФ d)

/-- **Helper (trivial-base reduction): `pullbackTensorMap` is an iso when both base modules
are trivial.** For `f : Y РЪХ X` and `P Q : X.Modules` each isomorphic to the unit `­Юњф_X`, the
comparison `pullbackTensorMap f P Q` is an isomorphism. Proof: conjugate the unit-pair iso
`pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso` by the trivialisations `eP, eQ` through the naturality square
`pullbackTensorMap_natural`. Both flanking factors of that square are isos (functor-images and
`tensorObjIsoOfIso` of isos), so the unit-pair iso transports to `pullbackTensorMap f P Q`. -/
private lemma pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_base_unit {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    {P Q : X.Modules} (eP : P РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
    (eQ : Q РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf) :
    IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f P Q) := by
  have hnat := pullbackTensorMap_natural f eP.hom eQ.hom
  -- the `tensorObj_functoriality` of two isos is the `.hom` of `tensorObjIsoOfIso`, hence iso.
  haveI : IsIso (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom) :=
    (tensorObjIsoOfIso eP eQ).isIso_hom
  haveI : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
      (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) := pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso f
  haveI : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom)) :=
    Functor.map_isIso _ _
  haveI hG : IsIso (tensorObj_functoriality ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eP.hom)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eQ.hom)) :=
    (tensorObjIsoOfIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).mapIso eP)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).mapIso eQ)).isIso_hom
  haveI hL : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map (tensorObj_functoriality eP.hom eQ.hom) РЅФ
      pullbackTensorMap f (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)
        (SheafOfModules.unit X.ringCatSheaf)) := inferInstance
  rw [hnat] at hL
  exact IsIso.of_isIso_comp_right (pullbackTensorMap f P Q)
    (tensorObj_functoriality ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eP.hom)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).map eQ.hom))
