  -- Reduce the RHS `╬х (pushforward ¤є')` to the concrete unit comparison `unitToPushforwardObjUnit`
  -- (proved D2Рђ▓ lemma `epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit`), then verify sectionwise.  Sectionwise the
  -- presheaf-of-modules unit `­ЮЪЎрхќ` over `X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ` is the structure ring as a module
  -- over itself, so a linear map out of it is determined by its value on `1` (`LinearMap.ext_ring`);
  -- both sides send `1 Рєд 1` (the `╬х`/unit structure maps preserve the ring unit).
  erw [epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit f]
  refine PresheafOfModules.hom_ext (fun U => ?_)
  apply ModuleCat.hom_ext
  ext
  erw [SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply]
  -- residual: `((hadj'.unit ­ЮЪЎрхќ РЅФ (pushforward ¤є').map (╬и G╬▓)).app U) 1 = (¤є'.app U) 1`.
  -- RHS `= 1` (`¤є'.app U` is a ring hom); the LHS is the `rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj'` unit `╬х`
  -- read sectionwise on `1`, which is likewise `1`.
  -- Split the composite, then reduce each factor: `╬и G╬▓ = (restrictScalars ╬▓').map (╬и pushforwardРѓђ)
  -- РЅФ ╬и (restrictScalars ╬▓')` with `╬и pushforwardРѓђ = ­ЮЪЎ`; the `(pushforward ¤є').map` reindexes the
  -- section to `op (f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ U)`; the presheaf-level unit value lemma collapses `hadj'.unit` to the
  -- unit-module restriction map of `M = ­ЮЪЎрхќ` along `adj.counit`, which preserves `1`.
  rw [PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]
  rw [Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp_╬и,
    show Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬и
        (PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf) = ­ЮЪЎ _ from rfl]
  erw [PresheafOfModules.pushforward_map_app_apply]
  -- collapse `hadj'.unit` to the unit-module restriction map of `­ЮЪЎрхќ` along `adj.counit`
  -- (the presheaf-level value lemma; unfold the `let` aliases so the rewrite matches syntactically
  -- without the `erw` whnf-explosion on the heavy `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` term).
  simp only [pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply]
  erw [PresheafOfModules.unit_map_one]
  -- REDUCED RESIDUAL (iter-027): the ╬и-collapse is now reduced Рђћ via the new presheaf-level unit
  -- value lemma `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply` + `unit_map_one` Рђћ to the single
  -- clean sectionwise identity (`W := op (f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ U)`):
  --   `((restrictScalars ╬▓').map ­ЮЪЎ РЅФ ╬и (restrictScalars ╬▓')).app W).hom 1 = (¤є'.app U) 1`.
  -- BOTH sides are the ring unit `1`:
  --   Рђб LHS: `(restrictScalars ╬▓').map ­ЮЪЎ = ­ЮЪЎ`, and the strong-monoidal oplax unit
  --     `╬и (restrictScalars ╬▓') = inv (╬х (restrictScalars ╬▓'))` (`Functor.OplaxMonoidal.inv_╬х`)
  --     preserves `1`, because `╬х РЅФ ╬и = ­ЮЪЎ` (`Functor.Monoidal.╬х_╬и _`, CONFIRMED to typecheck here)
  --     and the lax `╬х` sends `1 Рєд (╬▓'.app W) 1 = 1` (`ModuleCat.restrictScalars_╬и` + `map_one`),
  --     whence `╬и 1 = ╬и (╬х 1) = (╬х РЅФ ╬и) 1 = 1` by injectivity of the iso `╬х.app W`.
  --   Рђб RHS: `¤є'.app U` is a ring hom, so `(¤є'.app U) 1 = 1`.
  -- The remaining Lean obstacle is purely coercion/`OfNat` plumbing, NOT mathematics:
  --   (a) `map_one` does not fire on `ConcreteCategory.hom (¤є'.app U)` (RingCat-morphism coercion
  --       form); need the `RingCat`/`CommRingCat`-flavoured `map_one`/`RingHom.map_one` or to
  --       expose the `RingHom`.
  --   (b) the `╬х`-value step needs `1 : (­ЮЪЎ_ _).obj W`, whose carrier `One` instance Lean will not
  --       synthesize without reducing `­ЮЪЎ_ = unit _` (the same `OfNat` failure that blocks stating a
  --       standalone `restrictScalars`-oplax-`╬и`-on-unit helper Рђћ see iter-027 task_result).
  -- RESOLVED (iter-028): the LHS oplax-unit-on-`1` collapses to `1` via the standalone helper
  -- `restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_╬и_app_one` (states the unit through the genuine ring
  -- `(S РІЎ forgetРѓѓ Рђд).obj W` to dodge the `OfNat` synthesis (b), proof = lax `╬х(1)=1` +
  -- `Functor.Monoidal.╬х_╬и`); the RHS ring-hom `(¤є'.app U) 1 = 1` via `map_one` (the `erw`
  -- defeq-matches the `(restrictScalars ╬▓').map ­ЮЪЎ РЅФ ╬и` composite against the helper's `╬и`).
  erw [restrictScalars_oplaxMonoidal_╬и_app_one ╬▓' h╬▓ (Opposite.op (f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ Opposite.unop U)),
    map_one]
  rfl

set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
/-- **Sectionwise value of the RHS composition tensorator on a pure tensor (blueprint
`lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul`).** The directly-defined composition lax tensorator
`╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ¤є)` (= the ambient `Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (pushforward ¤є)`),
evaluated on a section `W` at a pure tensor `m РіЌРѓю n`, is the base-change value `m РіЌРѓю n`. By
`pushforward_╬╝_eq` (a `rfl`-identity) the single-pushforward ╬╝ is *defeq* to the `restrictScalars ¤є'`
╬╝ on the `pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat`-reindexed objects, which collapses on a pure tensor by
`restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` (the same helper family as `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`). Stated with abstract
base ring functors and objects (so the section module instances resolve cleanly, exactly as in
`restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul`); applied in the K1 assembly to `TРѓђ := (Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ Y.presheaf`,
`MРѓЂ := pushforwardРѓђ.obj (G╬▓.obj A)` etc. by definitional equality. -/
lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul
    {C : Type u} [Category.{u} C] {SРѓђ TРѓђ : Cрхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}}
    (¤є' : (SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ (TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (MРѓЂ MРѓѓ : _root_.PresheafOfModules (TРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) (W : Cрхњрхќ)
    (m : (MРѓЂ.obj W)) (n : (MРѓѓ.obj W)) :
    ((Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ¤є') MРѓЂ MРѓѓ).app W).hom
        (m РіЌРѓю[(SРѓђ РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).obj W] n) = m РіЌРѓю n :=
  -- The RHS composition tensorator `╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ¤є)` is, by `pushforward_╬╝_eq`
  -- (a `rfl`-identity), exactly this `restrictScalars ¤є'` ╬╝ on the `pushforwardРѓђ`-reindexed objects;
  -- `restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` collapses it on a pure tensor.  The base ring functors `SРѓђ TРѓђ` and the
  -- objects `MРѓЂ MРѓѓ` are abstract (as in `restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul`) so the section module instances
  -- resolve cleanly; in the K1 assembly it is applied to `TРѓђ := (Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ Y.presheaf`,
  -- `MРѓЂ := pushforwardРѓђ.obj (G╬▓.obj A)` etc. by definitional equality (`pushforward_╬╝_eq` is `rfl`).
  restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul ¤є' MРѓЂ MРѓѓ W m n

set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
/-- **Sectionwise value of the LHS mate tensorator on a pure tensor (blueprint
`lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`), packaged as the per-section comparison.** In the K1
setting, on a fixed open `W` the adjoint-transported tensorator `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj')`
agrees with the directly-defined composition tensorator `╬╝ (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ¤є')` on the
objects `G╬▓.obj A`, `G╬▓.obj B`.  We work sectionwise via `tensor_ext`: the RHS pure-tensor value is
`m РіЌРѓю n` by `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul`, and the genuine geometric residual is the LHS
*mate* value, obtained by unfolding the mate (`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_╬╝` + `homEquiv_unit`) and
computing the three legs sectionwise (unit acts by `M.map counit.op` via
`pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`; `╬┤ G╬▓` is the identity on pure tensors via the
`restrictScalars`-╬╝ helper family; the counit pair is the bijective `f.appIso`).  The parent assembles
this with `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`.  The LHS mate pure-tensor value remains the sole open residual. -/
lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
    (W : (TopologicalSpace.Opens РєЦX)рхњрхќ) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ¤є'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : Рѕђ U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf) РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf РІЎ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' := hadj
    (@Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є')
        (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj') (G╬▓.obj A) (G╬▓.obj B)).app W
      = (@Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є')
        (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ¤є') (G╬▓.obj A) (G╬▓.obj B)).app W := by
  intro ╬▒ ╬▓ hadj h╬▓ ╬▓' hadj'
  -- Sectionwise: `(G(G╬▓ A) РіЌ G(G╬▓ B)).obj W` is a genuine `ModuleCat` tensor, so `tensor_ext` fires.
  refine ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensor_ext (fun m n => ?_)
  rw [Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal_╬╝, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  rw [PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]
  -- INNER UNIT LEG Рђћ wall #1 CRACKED (iter-036).  `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`
  -- (an `rfl`) refuses to fire via `rw`/`simp`/`erw` on the heavy tensor object
  -- `M = G(G╬▓ A) РіЌ G(G╬▓ B)` through the `hadj'`/`hadj` let-fvar (the documented double-wall #1).
  -- FIX: package the value as a Рѕђ-`have` keyed *on the goal's own `hadj'.unit` fvar* (so no
  -- `РіЌ` re-elaboration Рєњ no carrier diamond, contra wall #2), proven by `exact Рђд _ _ _ _ _ M U x`
  -- (defeq to the lemma, all leading args inferred from the expected type).  Then `erw [hU]`
  -- (NOT `rw` Рђћ needs the coercion/instance defeq) discharges the inner unit, replacing it with the
  -- tensor-presheaf restriction `(G(G╬▓ A) РіЌ G(G╬▓ B)).map (adj.counit.app W.unop).op` on `m РіЌРѓю n`.
  have hU : Рѕђ (M : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
      (U : (TopologicalSpace.Opens РєЦX)рхњрхќ) (x : (M.obj U)),
      ((hadj'.unit.app M).app U).hom x
        = (M.map (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app U.unop).op).hom x :=
    fun M U x => pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply _ _ _ _ _ M U x
  erw [hU]
  -- REMAINING TELESCOPE (outer leg, now unblocked; LHS = `m РіЌРѓю n = RHS`).  After `erw [hU]` the LHS is
  --   `(pushforward ¤є').map (╬┤ G╬▓ (GX)(GY) РЅФ (╬х_A РіЌРѓў ╬х_B)) .app W .hom`
  --      applied to `(G(G╬▓ A) РіЌ G(G╬▓ B)).map (adj.counit.app W.unop).op .hom (m РіЌРѓю n)`,
  -- with `╬х = hadj'.counit`, `GX = G(G╬▓ A)`, `G = pushforward ¤є'`, `G╬▓ = pushforwardРѓђ РІЎ restrictScalars ╬▓'`.
  --
  -- TELESCOPE STEP (2)-split: `G.map (╬┤ РЅФ ╬хРіЌ╬х) = G.map ╬┤ РЅФ G.map (╬хРіЌ╬х)` (`Functor.map_comp`), then the
  -- section-evaluation `comp_app`/`hom_comp`/`comp_apply` so the LHS becomes the nested application
  --   `(G.map (╬хРіЌ╬х)).app W .hom ((G.map ╬┤).app W .hom ((GX РіЌ GY).map (adj.counit.app W.unop).op .hom (m РіЌРѓю n)))`.
  rw [Functor.map_comp, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  erw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, LinearMap.comp_apply]
  -- TELESCOPE STEP (1) Рђћ inner tensor-presheaf restriction on the pure tensor [VERIFIED iter-037]:
  --   `(GX РіЌ GY).map g .hom (mРіЌРѓюn) = (GX.map g .hom m) РіЌРѓю (GY.map g .hom n)`.
  -- The value lemma `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj_map_tmul` (an `rfl`) will NOT fire via bare
  -- `rw`/`erw` on the heavy `РіЌ` object (carrier-diamond: the goal's tensor objects carry type
  -- `PresheafOfModules X.ringCatSheaf.obj`, defeq-but-not-syntactic to `Рђд РІЎ forgetРѓѓ Рђд`).  RECIPE:
  -- state a Рѕђ-`have h1` keyed on an ABSTRACT ring functor `R` (so `R РІЎ forgetРѓѓ _ _` matches the
  -- `MonoidalCategoryStruct` instance head syntactically Рђћ dodges the diamond, cf. wall #1), proven by
  -- `exact tensorObj_map_tmul Рђд`; then INSTANTIATE it at the goal's concrete objects (`h1c`) and
  -- `erw [h1c]` (the residual `X.presheaf` vs `(sheafToPresheaf Рђд).obj X.sheaf` defeq is bridged by erw).
  have h1 : Рѕђ {R : (TopologicalSpace.Opens РєЉX)рхњрхќ РЦц CommRingCat.{u}}
      (P Q : _root_.PresheafOfModules (R РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
      {V : (TopologicalSpace.Opens РєЉX)рхњрхќ} (g : W РЪХ V) (p : P.obj W) (q : Q.obj W),
      ((P РіЌ Q).map g).hom (p РіЌРѓю q) = (P.map g).hom p РіЌРѓю (Q.map g).hom q := by
    intro R P Q V g p q; exact PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj_map_tmul g p q
  have h1c := h1 ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
      ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj A))
    ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
      ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj B))
    (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app W.unop).op m n
  erw [h1c]
  -- TELESCOPE STEP (2)-reindex [VERIFIED iter-037]: `(G.map (╬хРіЌ╬х)).app W` is `((pushforward ¤є').map _).app W`,
  -- so `pushforward_map_app_apply` (`rfl`) reindexes it to `(╬х_A РіЌРѓў ╬х_B).app (op ((Opens.map f.base).obj W.unop))`.
  -- (Plain `rw` fires on this OUTER leg; the inner `(G.map ╬┤).app W` leg is NOT matched by a second `rw` of
  -- the same lemma Рђћ after the first rewrite its coercion is `ConcreteCategory.hom`, not `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`,
  -- so the next prover must reindex the inner ╬┤ leg via `conv` into the inner application + `rw`, or via the
  -- instantiate-then-`erw` template Рђћ see residual roadmap below.)
  rw [PresheafOfModules.pushforward_map_app_apply]
  -- REMAINING TELESCOPE (LHS now
  --   `(╬х_A РіЌРѓў ╬х_B).app V' .hom ((G.map ╬┤).app W .hom (m' РіЌРѓю n'))`,  `V' = op ((Opens.map f.base).obj W.unop)`,
  --   with `m' = GX.map (adj.counit.app W.unop).op .hom m`, `n' = GY.map Рђд .hom n`).  Tools now in-file:
  --   (3) ╬┤ leg Рђћ reindex `(G.map ╬┤).app W` (`pushforward_map_app_apply`, on the inner application), then
  --       `╬┤ G╬▓` on a pure tensor is the identity: `Functor.OplaxMonoidal.comp` gives `╬┤ (pf0 РІЎ RS) =
  --       RS.map (╬┤ pf0) РЅФ ╬┤ RS` with `╬┤ pf0 = ­ЮЪЎ` (`rfl`), leaving the strong-`restrictScalars` ╬┤, which on
  --       the pure tensor is the NEW helper `restrictScalars_╬┤_app_tmul` (built iter-037: `╬┤ = inv ╬╝` via
  --       `Functor.Monoidal.╬╝_╬┤` + `restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul`) Рђћ apply via the instantiate-then-`erw`
  --       template used for step (1)/`h1c`.
  --   (4) counit pair `╬х_A РіЌРѓў ╬х_B`: split the `tensorHom` on the pure tensor
  --       (`ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_tmul`), then collapse each `hadj'.counit.app _` leg by the
  --       NEW counit value lemma `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply` (built iter-037, the dual
  --       of the unit `rfl`-lemma; counit acts sectionwise by `N.map (adj.unit.app U.unop).op`), via the
  --       same instantiate-then-`erw` template.  After (3)-(4) the unit `adj.counit` restriction of step `hU`
  --       composes with the counit-pair `adj.unit` restriction; for the open immersion these are mutually
  --       inverse on the image (`Functor.map_comp` + `adj.left/right_triangle` on opens), leaving
  --       `m РіЌРѓю n`, which equals the RHS by `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` (PROVEN, via
  --       `pushforward_╬╝_eq` defeq).
  -- STEP 3 (╬┤ leg).  Reindex the inner `(G.map ╬┤).app W` to `╬┤ G╬▓ .app V'` via
  -- `pushforward_map_app_apply` (its coercion is now `ConcreteCategory.hom`, so plain `rw` misses Рєњ `erw`),
  -- then collapse `╬┤ G╬▓` on the pure tensor by the in-file helper `restrictScalars_╬┤_app_tmul`.  No manual
  -- `comp_╬┤`/`map_id`/`id_comp` is needed: under `respectTransparency false` (active for this lemma) `erw`
  -- defeq-matches the composite `╬┤ G╬▓ = (restrictScalars ╬▓').map (╬┤ pf0) РЅФ ╬┤ (restrictScalars ╬▓')`
  -- (with `╬┤ pf0 = ­ЮЪЎ`) against the helper's `╬┤ (restrictScalars ╬▓')` directly Рђћ exactly as the ╬и-collapse
  -- `pushforward_eta_appIso_collapse` (L4311) matches `(restrictScalars ╬▓').map ­ЮЪЎ РЅФ ╬и` against `╬и`.
  erw [PresheafOfModules.pushforward_map_app_apply,
    restrictScalars_╬┤_app_tmul ╬▓' h╬▓
      ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf).obj
        ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
          ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
            PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj A)))
      ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf).obj
        ((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
          ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
            PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj B)))
      (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W)))]
  -- STEP 4 (counit pair).  Split the `tensorHom` `╬х_A РіЌРѓў ╬х_B` on the pure tensor:
  -- `tensorHom_app` pushes `.app V'` through `РіЌРѓў`, `tensorHom_tmul` splits the pure tensor.
  erw [PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorHom_app, ModuleCat.MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_tmul]
  -- Collapse each `hadj'.counit.app _` leg by the in-file value lemma
  -- `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply` (counit acts sectionwise by
  -- `N.map (adj.unit.app U.unop).op`), packaged as a Рѕђ-`have hC` keyed on the goal's own
  -- `hadj'.counit` fvar (the binder for `y` is the BIG composite object `(pushforward ¤є' РІЎ G╬▓).obj N`,
  -- NOT `N.obj U` Рђћ the counit's domain), mirroring the unit-side `hU`.
  have hC : Рѕђ (N : _root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
      (U : (TopologicalSpace.Opens РєЦY)рхњрхќ)
      (y : (((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom РІЎ
          (PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
            PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓')).obj N).obj U)),
      ConcreteCategory.hom ((hadj'.counit.app N).app U) y
        = ConcreteCategory.hom (N.map (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.unit.app U.unop).op) y :=
    fun N U y => pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply _ _ _ _ _ N U y
  -- Apply `hC` to each leg with ALL THREE args (`N := G╬▓.obj A / G╬▓.obj B`,
  -- `U := V' = op ((Opens.map f.base).obj W.unop)`, and the explicit `y` = the section element):
  -- leaving `N`/`U`/`y` as metavars makes `erw` whnf-explode on the heavy composite `y`-type search;
  -- pinning all three reduces it to a direct (bounded) match.  Two separate `erw`s (one per leg) so the
  -- second does not rescan the now-heavier collapsed first leg.
  erw [hC ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj A)
      (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W)))
      ((ModuleCat.Hom.hom (((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
            ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj A)).map
          (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op)) m)]
  erw [hC ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
        PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj B)
      (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W)))
      ((ModuleCat.Hom.hom (((PresheafOfModules.pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom).obj
            ((PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat (Hom.opensFunctor f) X.presheaf РІЎ
              PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').obj B)).map
          (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op)) n)]
  -- CLOSING.  RHS Рєњ `m РіЌРѓю n` by `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` (PROVEN, via `pushforward_╬╝_eq`
  -- defeq; `erw` bridges `╬╝ (pushforward ¤є')` РЅА `╬╝ (restrictScalars ¤є')`).
  erw [pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul]
  -- Each pure-tensor factor is the adjunction-triangle composite read sectionwise: the unit-restriction
  -- (`hU` discharge, `adj.counit`) and the counit-restriction (`hC`, `adj.unit`) are mutually inverse.
  -- `Opens X`/`Opens Y` are POSETS (thin categories), so after pushing both legs onto `A`/`B` via
  -- `pushforward_obj_map_apply` and combining (`Рєљ Functor.map_comp`), the net opens endomorphism is `­ЮЪЎ`
  -- by `Subsingleton.elim`, leaving `A.map ­ЮЪЎ = ­ЮЪЎ` РЄњ the section unchanged.
  -- Both factors are the SAME triangle composite (`adj.unit`-restriction after `adj.counit`-restriction)
  -- on an arbitrary presheaf `P` over `Y`'s site.  Factor it into a helper `hfac` keyed on an ABSTRACT `P`
  -- (the concrete `G╬▓.obj A`/`G╬▓.obj B` carry a carrier diamond + a propositional opens identity
  -- `fРЂ╗┬╣(f(fРЂ╗┬╣W)) = fРЂ╗┬╣W` that block `comp_apply`/`map_comp` matching).  In the abstract context the two
  -- restriction legs share `P`, so they compose; the composite opens endomorphism is `­ЮЪЎ` by
  -- `Subsingleton.elim` (`Opens Y` is a poset), whence `P.map ­ЮЪЎ = ­ЮЪЎ`.
  have hfac : Рѕђ (P : _root_.PresheafOfModules (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat))
      (z : РєЉ(P.obj (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W))))),
      ConcreteCategory.hom
          (P.map (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.unit.app
            ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W))).op)
        (ConcreteCategory.hom
          (P.map ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).map
            (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op.unop).op) z) = z := by
    intro P z
    -- `co РЅФ uo = ­ЮЪЎ` in the poset `Opens Y` (Subsingleton).  Manually forming `P.map co РЅФ P.map uo`
    -- fails to typecheck (the intermediate object `fРЂ╗┬╣(f(fРЂ╗┬╣W))` is defeq to `fРЂ╗┬╣W` only after unfolding
    -- `РІЎ`, which `РЅФ`'s elaborator won't do), so the composite is built indirectly through `P.map_comp`
    -- (which carries its own well-typed `РЅФ`); `comp_apply` is rfl on `ModuleCat`, bridging by defeq.
    have step : ConcreteCategory.hom (P.map
          (((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).map
              (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op.unop).op РЅФ
            (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.unit.app
              ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W))).op)) z = z := by
      conv_lhs => rw [show ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).map
              (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op.unop).op РЅФ
            (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.unit.app
              ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W))).op
          = ­ЮЪЎ _ from Subsingleton.elim _ _]
      exact (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom (P.map_id _) z).trans (CategoryTheory.id_apply z)
    exact (ConcreteCategory.congr_hom
      (P.map_comp
        ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).map
          (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.counit.app (Opposite.unop W)).op.unop).op
        (f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction.unit.app
          ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).obj (Opposite.unop W))).op) z).symm.trans step
  congr 1
  ┬и simp only [PresheafOfModules.pushforward_obj_map_apply]; exact hfac _ m
  ┬и simp only [PresheafOfModules.pushforward_obj_map_apply]; exact hfac _ n

/- Planner strategy (iter-027): genuine non-circular residual of K1's ╬╝-collapse, extracted by
effort-break. PROVE THIS by mirroring the PROVED in-project `pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝` (L2197) ONE-TO-ONE:
`hom_ext` to an open U; thread pure-tensor extensionality through `pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat` sections
(G╬▓.obj (AРіЌB) is a pushforward of a tensor, NOT syntactic Рђћ `tensor_ext` will NOT fire); expose ╬╝ via
`restrictScalars_╬╝_app`; collapse both legs to the common `f.appIso` base-change value via
`forgetРѓѓ_restrictScalars_╬╝_hom_tmul` / `pushforward_map_restrictScalars_╬╝_app_tmul` (use `erw`, no whnf).
Do NOT route through `hadj'.IsMonoidal`/`unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤` Рђћ empirically circular (iter-026).
Blueprint: chapters/Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex `lem:pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`. -/
lemma pushforward_lax_mu_comparison {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ¤є'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : Рѕђ U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf) РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf РІЎ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' := hadj
    @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є')
        (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal hadj') (G╬▓.obj A) (G╬▓.obj B)
      = @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є')
        (presheafPushforwardLaxMonoidal ¤є') (G╬▓.obj A) (G╬▓.obj B) := by
  intro ╬▒ ╬▓ hadj h╬▓ ╬▓' hadj'
  -- ASSEMBLY (iter-029, blueprint decomposition): the two lax structures on `pushforward ¤є'` agree on
  -- `G╬▓.obj A`, `G╬▓.obj B` as a *morphism* equality.  Reduce to the per-section comparison by
  -- `PresheafOfModules.hom_ext`, then defer each open `W` to `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`,
  -- which works sectionwise via `tensor_ext`: the RHS pure-tensor value is `m РіЌРѓю n` by
  -- `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_rhs_tmul` (PROVEN), and the LHS *mate* pure-tensor value is the sole
  -- residual (the genuine NON-circular geometric seam; routing through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` is CIRCULAR).
  exact PresheafOfModules.hom_ext (fun W => pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul f A B W)

/-- **Abstract mate-conjugation of two oplax tensorators sharing a right adjoint.** Let
`adjРѓЂ : FРѓЂ РіБ G` and `adjРѓѓ : FРѓѓ РіБ G` be two adjunctions onto the same lax-monoidal functor `G`, with
`FРѓЂ` (strong/oplax) and `FРѓѓ` oplax monoidal and `adjРѓѓ` a monoidal adjunction. If the right-adjoint-lax
tensorator `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ)` agrees, on the objects `FРѓЂ A`, `FРѓЂ B`, with the ambient
lax tensorator `╬╝ G` (the only genuine input, supplied non-circularly), then the strong oplax
tensorator `╬┤ FРѓЂ` equals the `leftAdjointUniq`-conjugate of `╬┤ FРѓѓ`. This is the abstract heart of the
K1 ╬╝/╬┤-collapse, stated with clean fvars so the mate `rw`-calculus carries no let-unfolding friction.
Proof: transpose across `adjРѓЂ.homEquiv`; `╬┤ FРѓЂ` becomes `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ)` by the
adjoint-mate identity `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤`; the conjugate `╬┤ FРѓѓ` leg contracts via
`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` (both ends) + `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤` for `adjРѓѓ` + `╬╝`-naturality;
the residual is exactly the hypothesis `h╬╝`. -/
lemma deltaConjOfMuComparison {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D]
    [MonoidalCategory C] [MonoidalCategory D]
    {FРѓЂ FРѓѓ : C РЦц D} {G : D РЦц C} (adjРѓЂ : FРѓЂ РіБ G) (adjРѓѓ : FРѓѓ РіБ G)
    [FРѓЂ.OplaxMonoidal] [FРѓѓ.OplaxMonoidal] [G.LaxMonoidal] [adjРѓѓ.IsMonoidal] (A B : C)
    (h╬╝ : @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ G (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ)
          (FРѓЂ.obj A) (FРѓЂ.obj B)
        = Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ G (FРѓЂ.obj A) (FРѓЂ.obj B)) :
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓЂ A B
      = (adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).hom.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓѓ A B
        РЅФ ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app A РіЌРѓў (adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app B) := by
  -- (TRIРЂ╗┬╣): `adjРѓѓ.unit P РЅФ G.map (H1.inv P) = adjРѓЂ.unit P` (since `H1.inv = (leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ adjРѓЂ).hom`).
  have htri' : Рѕђ P, adjРѓѓ.unit.app P РЅФ G.map ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app P)
      = adjРѓЂ.unit.app P := by
    intro P
    rw [Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_inv_app]
    exact Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app adjРѓѓ adjРѓЂ P
  -- (LHS mate): `╬┤ FРѓЂ` transposes to `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ)` (instance forced).
  have hLHS : adjРѓЂ.unit.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ G.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓЂ A B)
      = (adjРѓЂ.unit.app A РіЌРѓў adjРѓЂ.unit.app B) РЅФ
        @Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝ _ _ _ _ _ _ G (Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ)
          (FРѓЂ.obj A) (FРѓЂ.obj B) := by
    letI := Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal adjРѓЂ
    letI : adjРѓЂ.IsMonoidal := inferInstance
    exact adjРѓЂ.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤ A B
  -- ╬╝-naturality (tensorHom form) on the `H1.inv` legs; the `_left`/`_right` `@[simp]` variants are
  -- whiskering-based and do not fire on the `РіЌРѓў` form, so we feed the combined `╬╝_natural` by hand.
  have hnat := Functor.LaxMonoidal.╬╝_natural G ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app A)
    ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app B)
  -- Transpose across `adjРѓЂ`; `rw [hLHS]` turns the LHS `╬┤ FРѓЂ` into the mate `╬╝ (rightAdjointLaxMonoidal
  -- adjРѓЂ)`; `simp` runs the two `@[simp]` mate reductions (`unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_assoc` on the
  -- `H1.hom` leg, `unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤_assoc` on the `╬┤ FРѓѓ` leg) to the bare-╬╝ normal form.
  apply (adjРѓЂ.homEquiv _ _).injective
  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_unit, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
  -- Re-establish the goal in clean instance form (load-bearing: makes `rw [hLHS]` match syntactically).
  show adjРѓЂ.unit.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ G.map (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓЂ A B) =
    adjРѓЂ.unit.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ G.map ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).hom.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ
      Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓѓ A B РЅФ
        ((adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app A РіЌРѓў (adjРѓЂ.leftAdjointUniq adjРѓѓ).inv.app B))
  rw [hLHS]
  simp [Adjunction.unit_app_tensor_comp_map_╬┤_assoc]
  -- Slide `╬╝` past the `H1.inv` legs (`Рєљ hnat`) and merge the tensor; the residual is the per-factor
  -- contraction `htri'` and the bare tensorator comparison `h╬╝`, assembled defeq via `congr_argРѓѓ`
  -- (a direct `rw`/`simp` of these last two legs is blocked by an instance-path matching quirk).
  conv_rhs => rw [Рєљ hnat, Рєљ Category.assoc, MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom]
  exact congr_argРѓѓ (┬и РЅФ ┬и)
    (congr_argРѓѓ MonoidalCategory.tensorHom (htri' A).symm (htri' B).symm) h╬╝

/-- **K1 ╬╝/╬┤-side collapse: `H1` respects the tensorator.** In the K1 setting, for all presheaves
of modules `A B`, the strong tensorator `╬┤ G╬▓ A B` of the restriction functor agrees with the
`H1`-conjugate of the oplax tensorator `╬┤ (pullback ¤є') A B`. This is the genuine geometric content
of K1 (the ╬╝/╬┤-side twin of `presheafUnit_comp_map_eta`, the open-immersion analogue of
`pushforwardComp_lax_╬╝`). It is the abstract mate-conjugation `deltaConjOfMuComparison` fed the bare
tensorator comparison `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison` (the genuine, NON-circular geometric input;
routing through `hadj'.IsMonoidal` would be circular, since that instance consumes this lemma). -/
lemma pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) [IsOpenImmersion f]
    (A B : _root_.PresheafOfModules (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)) :
    letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
        (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
    haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
      (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ¤є'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    have h╬▓ : Рѕђ U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf) РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf РІЎ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' := hadj
    Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ G╬▓ A B
      = (hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є')).hom.app (A РіЌ B)
        РЅФ Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є') A B
        РЅФ ((hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є')).inv.app A
            РіЌРѓў (hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є')).inv.app B) := by
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
  let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf :=
    { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }
  let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
    Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
  -- `hadj` is a `let` (not `have`): keeps the goal's `H1 = hadj'.leftAdjointUniq` term in its
  -- fully-unfolded `pushforwardPushforwardAdj Рђд` form key-matchable via `erw` (cf. the ╬и-side).
  let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' :=
    PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ¤є'
      (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
      (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
  have h╬▓ : Рѕђ U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
    intro U
    haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
      inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
    exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
  let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf) РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
  letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
    PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
  letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf РІЎ
    PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
  let hadj' : G╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' := hadj
  -- ╬┤-side of "H1 is a monoidal natural iso": the genuine geometric content of K1, discharged by the
  -- abstract mate-conjugation `deltaConjOfMuComparison` (clean fvars Рђћ no let-fold/instance friction),
  -- fed the bare tensorator comparison `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison`.  Routing through
  -- `hadj'.IsMonoidal` would be circular, as that instance (K1's `hmon`) consumes this lemma.
  exact deltaConjOfMuComparison hadj' (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є') A B
    (pushforward_lax_mu_comparison f A B)

/-- **Abstract iso-sandwich: an oplax tensorator conjugate to a strong one is an iso.**
If `FРѓЂ` is strong monoidal (so its oplax `╬┤` is invertible), `FРѓѓ` is oplax monoidal, `e : FРѓЂ РЅЁ FРѓѓ`
is any natural iso, and the `╬┤`'s are conjugate via `e`
(`╬┤ FРѓЂ A B = e.hom.app (AРіЌB) РЅФ ╬┤ FРѓѓ A B РЅФ (e.inv.app A РіЌРѓў e.inv.app B)`, the conclusion of
`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`), then `╬┤ FРѓѓ A B` is itself an iso: it equals the all-iso
composite `inv (e.hom.app (AРіЌB)) РЅФ ╬┤ FРѓЂ A B РЅФ inv (e.inv.app A РіЌРѓў e.inv.app B)`. -/
lemma isIso_oplax╬┤_of_conj {C D : Type*} [Category C] [Category D]
    [MonoidalCategory C] [MonoidalCategory D] {FРѓЂ FРѓѓ : C РЦц D}
    [FРѓЂ.Monoidal] [FРѓѓ.OplaxMonoidal] (e : FРѓЂ РЅЁ FРѓѓ) (A B : C)
    (hconj : Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓЂ A B
      = e.hom.app (A РіЌ B) РЅФ Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓѓ A B
        РЅФ (e.inv.app A РіЌРѓў e.inv.app B)) :
    IsIso (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓѓ A B) := by
  have h2 : Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓѓ A B
      = inv (e.hom.app (A РіЌ B)) РЅФ Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ FРѓЂ A B
        РЅФ inv (e.inv.app A РіЌРѓў e.inv.app B) := by
    rw [hconj]; simp
  rw [h2]; infer_instance

/-- **K1: `pullbackTensorMap` is an isomorphism for an open immersion.**
For an open immersion `f : Y РЪХ X` (e.g. an `Opens.╬╣`) and arbitrary `M N : X.Modules`,
the comparison `pullbackTensorMap f M N` is an isomorphism. Geometric content: pullback
along an open immersion is restriction, which is *strong* monoidal (it is sectionwise the
structure-ring iso `f.appIso`, cf. `tensorObj_restrict_iso`), so the oplax comparison `╬┤`
is invertible. We reduce to the sheafified presheaf `╬┤` via
`isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta`. -/
lemma pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    [IsOpenImmersion f] (M N : X.Modules) :
    IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f M N) := by
  apply isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta
  -- RESIDUAL (the sole open brick of D4Рђ▓).  Goal: `IsIso (a_Y.map ╬┤)` where `╬┤` is the
  -- presheaf-level oplax comparison of `PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є'`
  -- (¤є' = `(Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom`).
  -- STEP A (sheafification preserves isos).  It suffices to show the PRESHEAF-level
  -- `IsIso (╬┤ (pullback ¤є') M.val N.val)`; then `a_Y.map` of an iso is an iso
  -- (`Functor.map_isIso`).
  letI ¤є' : (X.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
      (TopologicalSpace.Opens.map f.base).op РІЎ (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) :=
      (f.toRingCatSheafHom).hom
  haveI hRA : (PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є').IsRightAdjoint :=
    (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є').isRightAdjoint
  haveI h╬┤ : IsIso (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤
      (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є') M.val N.val) := by
    -- The presheaf-level oplax `╬┤ (pullback ¤є')` is conjugate (via the adjoint-uniqueness iso `H1`)
    -- to the strong tensorator `╬┤ G╬▓` of `G╬▓ = pushforwardРѓђ РІЎ restrictScalars ╬▓'`, which IS an iso
    -- because `G╬▓` is `Functor.Monoidal` (`restrictScalars ╬▓'` is strong for the sectionwise-bijective
    -- structure-ring map `╬▓`).  The conjugation is exactly `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`; the
    -- abstract sandwich `isIso_oplax╬┤_of_conj` reads off `IsIso (╬┤ (pullback ¤є'))` from it.  We only
    -- need to put `G╬▓.Monoidal` in local scope (via `hMon╬▓`) so the helper's `[FРѓЂ.Monoidal]` resolves.
    let ╬▒ : Y.presheaf РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf :=
      { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }
    let ╬▓ : Y.ringCatSheaf.obj РЪХ f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.ringCatSheaf.obj :=
      Functor.whiskerRight ╬▒ (forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat)
    have h╬▓ : Рѕђ U, Function.Bijective (╬▓.app U).hom := by
      intro U
      haveI : IsIso (╬▓.app U) :=
        inferInstanceAs (IsIso ((forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat).map (f.appIso U.unop).inv))
      exact ConcreteCategory.bijective_of_isIso (╬▓.app U)
    let ╬▓' : (Y.presheaf РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat) РЪХ
        (f.opensFunctor.op РІЎ X.presheaf) РІЎ forgetРѓѓ CommRingCat RingCat := ╬▓
    letI hMon╬▓ : (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓').Monoidal :=
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective ╬▓' h╬▓
    -- Reconstruct `G╬▓`, `hadj'`, `H1` concretely (identical to `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`'s
    -- own preamble) so the helper's `FРѓЂ = G╬▓`, `FРѓѓ = pullback ¤є'` and `e = H1` are fixed terms;
    -- with `e` explicit the let-binders in the collapse lemma's conclusion zeta-reduce under defeq.
    let hadj : PresheafOfModules.pushforward ╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' :=
      PresheafOfModules.pushforwardPushforwardAdj f.isOpenEmbedding.isOpenMap.adjunction ╬▓ ¤є'
        (by ext U x; exact congr($((f.app_appIso_inv _).symm).hom x))
        (by ext U x; exact congr($(f.appIso_inv_app_presheafMap U.unop) x))
    letI G╬▓ := PresheafOfModules.pushforwardРѓђOfCommRingCat f.opensFunctor X.presheaf РІЎ
      PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars ╬▓'
    let hadj' : G╬▓ РіБ PresheafOfModules.pushforward ¤є' := hadj
    exact isIso_oplax╬┤_of_conj
      (hadj'.leftAdjointUniq (PresheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction ¤є')) M.val N.val
      (pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse f M.val N.val)
  exact Functor.map_isIso _ (Functor.OplaxMonoidal.╬┤ (PresheafOfModules.pullback ¤є') M.val N.val)

/-- **Per-chart isomorphism (D4Рђ▓ chart-chase core).** For `f : Y РЪХ X`, modules `M N : X.Modules`
trivialised on the open `W Ріє X` (via `eM, eN`), the restriction of `pullbackTensorMap f M N`
to the preimage chart `f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ W` is an isomorphism.  This is the body of the cover argument of
`pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial`.  Route: transport `restrictFunctor (fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣` to
`pullback (fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣` (`restrictFunctorIsoPullback`); apply the base-change identity
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (D3Рђ▓) for the open immersion `(fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣` to isolate the wanted factor
`(pullback (fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣).map (pullbackTensorMap f M N)` from `pullbackTensorMap ((fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣ РЅФ f) M N`,
where the two flanking factors are isos (K1 on `(fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣`).  The composite map is shown iso via
the *second* factorisation `(fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣ РЅФ f = g РЅФ W.╬╣` (`g = f.resLE`), where again D3Рђ▓ splits it into
K1 (on `W.╬╣`) and the trivial-base case (K2, since `W.╬╣^*M РЅЁ ­Юњф_W`). -/
private lemma chart_isIso {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X) (M N : X.Modules) (W : X.Opens)
    (eM : M.restrict W.╬╣ РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit (W : Scheme).ringCatSheaf)
    (eN : N.restrict W.╬╣ РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit (W : Scheme).ringCatSheaf) :
    IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctor (f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ W).╬╣).map (pullbackTensorMap f M N)) := by
  -- Notation: `j' = (fРЂ╗┬╣W).╬╣ : fРЂ╗┬╣W РЪХ Y`, `g = f.resLE W (fРЂ╗┬╣W) : fРЂ╗┬╣W РЪХ W`,
  -- with `g РЅФ W.╬╣ = j' РЅФ f`.
  set V : Y.Opens := f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ W with hV
  set j' : (V : Scheme) РЪХ Y := V.╬╣ with hj'
  set g : (V : Scheme) РЪХ (W : Scheme) := f.resLE W V le_rfl with hg
  have hgcomp : g РЅФ W.╬╣ = j' РЅФ f := Scheme.Hom.resLE_comp_╬╣ f le_rfl
  -- Step 1: transport `restrictFunctor j'` to `pullback j'`.
  rw [NatIso.isIso_map_iff (Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback j') (pullbackTensorMap f M N)]
  -- Goal: `IsIso ((pullback j').map (pullbackTensorMap f M N))`.
  -- K1 instances for the open immersions `j'` and `W.╬╣`.
  haveI hK1j' : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap j' ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj M)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj N)) :=
    pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion j' _ _
  haveI hK1W : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap W.╬╣ M N) :=
    pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion W.╬╣ M N
  -- K2 instance: `pullbackTensorMap g (W.╬╣^*M) (W.╬╣^*N)` (the base modules are trivial over W).
  haveI hK2 : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap g ((Scheme.Modules.pullback W.╬╣).obj M)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback W.╬╣).obj N)) :=
    pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_base_unit g
      (((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback W.╬╣).app M).symm РЅфРЅФ eM)
      (((Scheme.Modules.restrictFunctorIsoPullback W.╬╣).app N).symm РЅфРЅФ eN)
  -- LHS iso: `pullbackTensorMap (j' РЅФ f) M N` via the `g РЅФ W.╬╣` factorisation (D3Рђ▓ + K1 + K2).
  -- The composite of the four iso-factors (`IsIso.comp_isIso'`, since composite-iso is not an
  -- auto instance); proofs supplied explicitly to avoid metavariable-ordered instance search.
  haveI hLHS : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap (j' РЅФ f) M N) := by
    rw [Рєљ hgcomp, pullbackTensorMap_restrict g W.╬╣ M N]
    have hA2 : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g W.╬╣).inv.app (M.tensorObj N)) := inferInstance
    have hB2 : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback g).map (pullbackTensorMap W.╬╣ M N)) :=
      Functor.map_isIso (Scheme.Modules.pullback g) (pullbackTensorMap W.╬╣ M N)
    have hD2 : IsIso (tensorObjIsoOfIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g W.╬╣).app M)
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp g W.╬╣).app N)).hom := inferInstance
    exact IsIso.comp_isIso' hA2 (IsIso.comp_isIso' hB2 (IsIso.comp_isIso' hK2 hD2))
  -- Isolate the wanted middle factor from the `j' РЅФ f` factorisation (D3Рђ▓): the two flanking
  -- factors are isos (`pullbackComp` inv-component and `tensorObjIsoOfIso`), `hK1j'` is the third.
  have hEq := pullbackTensorMap_restrict j' f M N
  rw [hEq] at hLHS
  -- the two flanking factors are isos: the `pullbackComp` inverse-component (cast from the
  -- `.app _ |>.inv` form) and the `tensorObjIsoOfIso` hom; `hK1j'` is the third.
  have hAj' : IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp j' f).inv.app (M.tensorObj N)) :=
    inferInstanceAs (IsIso (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp j' f).app (M.tensorObj N)).inv))
  have hDj' : IsIso (tensorObjIsoOfIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp j' f).app M)
      ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp j' f).app N)).hom := inferInstance
  exact isIso_of_isIso_comp4_mid hLHS hAj' hK1j' hDj'

/-- **D4Рђ▓ Рђћ Pullback commutes with `РіЌ` on locally-trivial pairs** (blueprint
`lem:pullback_tensor_iso_loctriv`). For a morphism `f : Y РЪХ X` and locally-trivial
`M N : X.Modules`, promotes the comparison map `pullbackTensorMap f M N` to an isomorphism
via a chart-chase with `isIso_of_isIso_restrict` (over a common trivialising cover of Y),
`pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (D3Рђ▓), `pullbackTensorMap_natural` (D1Рђ▓), and
`pullbackTensorMap_unit_isIso` (D2Рђ▓). The hom of the returned iso is `pullbackTensorMap f M N`. -/
noncomputable def pullbackTensorIsoOfLocallyTrivial {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : Y РЪХ X)
    {M N : X.Modules} (hM : LineBundle.IsLocallyTrivial M) (hN : LineBundle.IsLocallyTrivial N) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj (tensorObj M N) РЅЁ
      tensorObj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj M) ((Scheme.Modules.pullback f).obj N) := by
  -- The `IsIso` instance is the sole obligation; the iso is `asIso`.
  haveI : IsIso (pullbackTensorMap f M N) := by
    classical
    -- For each `y : Y`, a common trivialising affine chart `W РѕІ f.base y` for both `M` and `N`,
    -- obtained by refining the two trivialising opens to a common affine sub-open
    -- (`exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset`) and transporting via `restrictIsoUnitOfLE`.
    have hchart : Рѕђ y : Y, РѕЃ W : X.Opens, f.base y Рѕѕ W РѕД
        Nonempty (M.restrict W.╬╣ РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit (W : Scheme).ringCatSheaf) РѕД
        Nonempty (N.restrict W.╬╣ РЅЁ SheafOfModules.unit (W : Scheme).ringCatSheaf) := by
      intro y
      obtain РЪеUM, hxUM, _, РЪеeMРЪЕРЪЕ := hM (f.base y)
      obtain РЪеUN, hxUN, _, РЪеeNРЪЕРЪЕ := hN (f.base y)
      obtain РЪеW, _, hxW, hWsubРЪЕ :=
        exists_isAffineOpen_mem_and_subset (X := X) (x := f.base y) (U := UM РіЊ UN) РЪеhxUM, hxUNРЪЕ
      exact РЪеW, hxW, РЪеrestrictIsoUnitOfLE (le_trans hWsub inf_le_left) eMРЪЕ,
        РЪеrestrictIsoUnitOfLE (le_trans hWsub inf_le_right) eNРЪЕРЪЕ
    choose W hxW eM eN using hchart
    -- The cover `{fРЂ╗┬╣W y}` of `Y`; each chart obligation is the closed `chart_isIso`.
    refine isIso_of_isIso_restrict (pullbackTensorMap f M N)
      (fun y => f РЂ╗┬╣рхЂ (W y)) (fun y => hxW y) (fun y => ?_)
    exact chart_isIso f M N (W y) (eM y).some (eN y).some
  exact asIso (pullbackTensorMap f M N)

end LocTrivPullbackTensor

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement Рђћ restrict-side conjugate of `restrictFunctorComp`

Restrict-world mirror of Mathlib's `Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`, which exists
for the pullback world only because `pullbackComp` is *defined* as `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso`
(so the pullback identity holds by `rfl`).  `restrictFunctorComp` is built from
`pushforwardNatIso`/`pushforwardCongr`/`pushforwardComp.symm` instead, so the abstract `rfl`
shortcut does not apply directly; we instead rewrite `(restrictFunctorComp f g).hom` to the
inverse of the abstract `leftAdjointCompIso` of the same data (a sectionwise thin-poset identity
on `M.presheaf.map`) and then close the conjugate equality by the abstract Mathlib lemma
`Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv`.  This is the shared keystone on which both
Bridge B2 and the Bridge B1 crux in `TensorObjInverse.lean` reduce. -/
section ConjugateRestrictFunctorComp

/-- Sectionwise value of `(restrictFunctor f).map`: pushforward along an open immersion acts on a
morphism `¤є` by reindexing its components through `f ''рхЂ -`.  Holds by `rfl`; project-local because
it is only used to drive the sectionwise reduction in
`conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`. -/
private lemma restrictFunctor_map_app' {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : X РЪХ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f]
    {M N : Y.Modules} (¤є : M РЪХ N) (U : X.Opens) :
    ((restrictFunctor f).map ¤є).app U = ¤є.app (f ''рхЂ U) := rfl

set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
-- The sectionwise reduction below traverses the `SheafOfModules.pushforward` carrier diamond
-- (`restrict_map`/`erw` past defeq-not-syntactic `РЅФ`), which needs a raised heartbeat budget.
set_option linter.unusedTactic false in
set_option linter.unreachableTactic false in
/-- **Restrict-side conjugate of the restriction-composition isomorphism.**
The conjugate of `(restrictFunctorComp f g).hom` across the composite restrict-adjunction equals
`(pushforwardComp f g).hom`.  Public so the terminal file can consume it. -/
lemma conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv {X Y Z : Scheme.{u}} (f : X РЪХ Y) (g : Y РЪХ Z)
    [IsOpenImmersion f] [IsOpenImmersion g] :
    conjugateEquiv ((restrictAdjunction g).comp (restrictAdjunction f))
        (restrictAdjunction (f РЅФ g)) (restrictFunctorComp f g).hom
      = (pushforwardComp f g).hom := by
  -- Reduce to the abstract `leftAdjointCompIso` identity; the residual is the sectionwise
  -- comparison `(restrictFunctorComp f g).hom = (leftAdjointCompIso Рђд).inv`.
  rw [show (restrictFunctorComp f g).hom
      = (Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso (restrictAdjunction g) (restrictAdjunction f)
          (restrictAdjunction (f РЅФ g)) (pushforwardComp f g)).inv from ?_]
  ┬и exact Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv _ _ _ _
  ┬и ext M U : 3
    rw [restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app]
    simp only [Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso, conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_apply_inv,
      Iso.symm_inv, conjugateEquiv_symm_apply_app, Adjunction.comp_unit_app, Hom.comp_app,
      restrictFunctor_map_app', pushforwardComp_hom_app_app]
    erw [Hom.comp_app, restrictAdjunction_unit_app_app, pushforward_map_app,
      restrictAdjunction_unit_app_app, restrictAdjunction_counit_app_app]
    simp only [Functor.comp_obj, restrict_map]
    -- All legs are now `M.presheaf.map _ .op` of `Opensрхњрхќ` morphisms; merge them at map level
    -- (the carrier is never forced) and collapse by thin-poset uniqueness.
    erw [Category.id_comp, Рєљ M.presheaf.map_comp, Рєљ M.presheaf.map_comp]
    all_goals first
      | rfl
      | (congr 1; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _)

end ConjugateRestrictFunctorComp

end Modules

end Scheme

end AlgebraicGeometry
